schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.brief: A scheme by Ministry of Finance for financing SC/ST and  Women Entrepreneurs by facilitating bank loans for setting up a greenfield project  Enterprise in manufacturing, services, trading sector and activities allied to agriculture.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.brief: An Accident Insurance Scheme offering accidental death and disability cover for death or disability on account of an accident.

schemes.name: Scheme For Financial Assistance For Veteran Artists
schemes.brief: A pension scheme by MoC improves the financial and socio-economic status of the old artists and scholars who have contributed significantly in their specialized fields. Still, due to old age, they have to lead a miserable life or are in penury condition.

schemes.name: Research Grant For In-Service Faculty Members
schemes.brief: The scheme "Research Grant for In-Service Faculty Members" was introduced by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education (DoHE). The objective of this research grant is to provide opportunities to regularly appointed faculty members of Universities/ Institutes/ Colleges.

schemes.name: Internship Programme By The Ministry Of External Affairs
schemes.brief: The Ministry of External Affairs launched the first edition of the Internship Programme in 2022. The internship policy aims to take foreign policy closer to the people. A total of 75 internships will be offered in the year 2022 in a single term of three months during April to June 2022.

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme For The Students Belonging To Scheduled Tribe For Studies In India
schemes.brief: This is a centrally sponsored scheme by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs, for the students of Scheduled Tribe (ST) for studies in India. This scheme is for pursuing higher education starting from class XI to Post Graduation courses in India.

schemes.name: Persons With Disabilities Scheme In Colleges: Higher Education For Persons With Special Needs
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The Persons with Disabilities Act 1995 indicates that differently-abled persons should have access to education at all levels. In the higher education sector, the University Grants Commission (UGC) is supporting universities and colleges in the country to involve in special education activities.

schemes.name: Indirect Tax Internship Scheme In Central Board Of Indirect Taxes And Customs (CBIC)
schemes.brief: The "Indirect Tax Internship Scheme" by CBIC takes Law Students/ Graduates as Interns every year. The interns are expected to study case files, assist in legal research and drafting of petitions, brief the counsels and extend any other related legal/general assistance to officers/counsels.

schemes.name: National Solar Science Fellowship Programme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemes.brief: The “National Solar Science Fellowship Programme” of the Ministry of New & Renewable Energy was launched in February 2011. The aim of the National Solar Science Fellowship Programme is to provide a platform to top-quality scientists and engineers in the area of solar energy research.

schemes.name: Summer Internship Scheme Of DGFT
schemes.brief: The Summer Internship Scheme by the Directorate General of Foreign Trade is for the interaction of the officers of the Directorate with young scholars and researchers with brilliant academic backgrounds from reputed academic institutions pursuing Studies/Research in Public Policy/Economics/Law etc.

schemes.name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC) Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Personnel, Public Grievances And Pensions
schemes.brief: CVC initiated an Internship Scheme in the year 2016. This Scheme seeks to engage Indian Nationals, who are Graduates (awaiting final year results) /Post Graduate or Research Students enrolled in reputed Universities/Institutions in India or abroad.

schemes.name: Swatantrata Sainik Samman Pension Scheme
schemes.brief: Launched on 15th August 1972, "Swatantrata Sainik Samman Pension Scheme" is a Pension Scheme by the Ministry of Home Affairs. The scheme provides the grant of pension to living freedom fighters and their families; if they are no more alive, and to the families or martyrs.

schemes.name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-matric Scholarship to Other Backward Classes (OBC) for Studies in India
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: "Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-matric Scholarship to Other Backward Classes for Studies in India" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment. The objective is to award scholarships to school-going children of poorer OBC parents.

schemes.name: Abdul Kalam Technology Innovation National Fellowship
schemes.brief: Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE) will award "Abdul Kalam Technology Innovation National Fellowship" to outstanding engineers to recognize, encourage and support translational research by individuals to achieve excellence in engineering, innovation and technology development.

schemes.name: Green Business Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: Green Business Scheme has been launched by the National Safai Karamcharis Finance and Development Corporation to provide financial assistance in the form of loans for activities that can tackle the impacts of climate change and also be income-generating.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan - Internship Program
schemes.brief: The 'Internship Program' as part of the Framework for Implementation of Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Revamped Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) (2022-23 to 2025-26) of the Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR), Government of India (Gol), seeks to engage 'Students'.

schemes.name: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Direct Benefit to Artisans - Supports to Artisans in Indigent Circumstances
schemes.brief: The scheme "Direct Benefit to Artisans - Supports to Artisans in Indigent Circumstances" is designed to give a boost to the handicraft sector in India. Assistance of upto ₹8,000/- per month is granted to the Artisans in Indigent Circumstances in the form of monthly allowance/lump sum grant/ both.

schemes.name: National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The “National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship” scheme by the Earth System Science Organization, Ministry of Earth Sciences, provides various opportunities for school as well as college students to familiarise and/or pursue research on different branches of earth sciences.

schemes.name: The NSFDC Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: "The NSFDC Internship Scheme 2024" is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. The internship will expose students to various programs & schemes undertaken by NSFDC, offering them hands-on experience in

schemes.name: ICSSR Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.brief: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) offers Doctoral Fellowships to support full-time Ph.D. scholars engaged in high-quality research in the field of social and human sciences. These fellowships are awarded to Indian research scholars registered in Ph.D. programs at UGC-recognized u

schemes.name: "Marketing Incentive" under the "Handloom Marketing Assistance" Component of the National Handloom Development Programme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to develop and promote marketing channels for handloom products to bring greater visibility to the sector and ensure commensurate remuneration to weavers. It provides Marketing Incentive to eligible handloom agencies for creating conducive conditions for marketing handloom products.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Full Time PhD Candidates
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims at generating a total of 1000 Full-time PhD Candidates in emerging research areas of Electronic System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (ITES) sectors over a period of 5 years.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Part Time PhD Candidates
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims at generating a total of 150 Part-time PhDs in emerging research areas of Electronics System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (IT/ITES) sectors over a period of 5 years.

schemes.name: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Young Faculty Research Fellowships
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: This fellowship is meant for Young Faculty having regular position at their institution and proven track record in research. Support is provisioned for 50 candidates, for an initial period of support of 2 years, extendible till 5 years based on performance review.

schemes.name: Financial Assistance as Interest Subsidy on Home Loan
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide 50% reimbursement of interest on home loans up to ₹1,00,000 for eligible war widows, war bereaved families, war disabled personnel, and attributable peacetime casualties.

schemes.name: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship among Scheduled Caste individuals by providing concessional finance. Benefits include investment ranging from ₹10,00,000/- to ₹15,00,00,000/- as debt or equity for eligible Private Limited or Public Limited companies.

schemes.name: Post-Graduate Scholarships for Professional Courses for SC/ST Candidates
schemes.brief: The scheme has been initiated to provide opportunity to deprived sections of the society, viz. SC/ST for undertaking postgraduate level studies in Professional subjects like Engineering & Technology, Management, Pharmacy etc. in recognised Indian Universities/Institutions/Colleges.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan (PM-USP) Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University students
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by the Dept. of Higher Education to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families to meet a part of their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies. The scholarships are awarded on the basis of results of Higher Secondary / Class 12th Board Exam

schemes.name: Free Education For Sports Medal Winners / Participants Of National/ International Events
schemes.brief: The scheme of "Free Education for Sports Medal Winners / Participants of National/ International Events" is introduced by UGC, to provide financial assistance to the medal winners\ elite sports persons studying in universities/colleges leading to all the full-time regular courses.

schemes.name: NITI Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: NITI Aayog (National Institution for Transforming India)
schemes.brief: This Scheme seeks to engage students pursuing Under Graduate/Graduate/Post Graduate Degrees or are Research Scholars enrolled in recognized University/Institution within India or abroad, as "interns". They shall be given exposure to various Verticals/ Divisions/Units within NITI Aayog.

schemes.name: Sukhatme National Award in Statistics
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Statistics and Programme Implementation
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognise excellence in statistical research and official statistics. Through this scheme, national recognition is provided to eligible Indian statisticians for lifetime or young achiever contributions.

schemes.name: Study in India Programme
schemes.brief: The Study in India Programme aims to promote India as a global education hub by offering centralized admissions, quality education, and visa support to international students.”

schemes.name: Dr Ambedkar Central Sector Scheme of Interest Subsidy on Educational Loans for Overseas Studies for Other Backward Classes (OBCs) and Economically Backward Classes (EBCs)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme provides interest subsidy to the students belonging to the OBCs and EBCs on the interest payable for the period of the moratorium for the Education Loans for overseas studies to pursue approved courses of studies abroad at Masters, M.Phil. and PhD level.

schemes.name: Khadi Gramodyog Vikas Yojana: Khadi Vikas Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to increase productivity and wages of Khadi artisans, improve production infrastructure, boost employment and sales, revive traditional rural skills, modernize sales outlets, and promote marketing and exports.

schemes.name: Teachers Associateship for Research Excellence
schemes.brief: The scheme “Teachers Associateship for Research Excellence (TARE)” was launched by Science & Engineering Research Board, Department of Science & Technology, Government of India which aims to facilitate mobility of faculty members working in State Universities /Colleges/Private Academic institutions.

schemes.name: Raman-Charpak Fellowship
schemes.brief: The “Raman-Charpak Fellowship Programme” is in honour of two Nobel Laureates in Physics, Prof C.V. Raman, Indian Nobel Laureate (1930) & Prof Georges Charpak, French Nobel Laureate (1992). The Fellowship was launched during the State visit of the President of France to India in February, 2013.

schemes.name: PRISM (Promoting Innovations in Individuals, Start-ups and MSMEs): Category-2: Fabrication of Working Model/Process Know-how/Testing & Trial/Patenting/Technology Transfer
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote innovations in individuals, start-ups, and Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (PRISM). It offers financial support (up to ₹20,00,000/-) for Indian Citizens working on innovation projects requiring fabrication of working models, patenting, or technology transfer.

schemes.name: One District One Product (ODOP) Awards
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize and celebrate the outstanding efforts of States, UTs, Districts, and Indian Missions Abroad in promoting local products. It also seeks to boost economic development and support the Hon’ble Prime Minister’s vision of Atmanirbhar Bharat.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vigyan Puraskar
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The Rashtriya Krishi Vigyan Puraskar (RKVP) aims to honor scientists and technical experts for outstanding contributions and innovations in agriculture and allied sciences.

schemes.name: Police Medal for Meritorious Service
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, medals, official recognition, and service distinction are provided to the personnel serving in police, CAPFs, CPOs, and other public safety organizations.

schemes.name: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme offers students exposure to anti-corruption laws and institutions. Interns learn about governance, legal frameworks, and contribute ideas to enhance transparency and accountability in public administration.

schemes.name: National Award to Teachers (For Excellence in Vocational Training and Entrepreneurship Development)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.brief: The objective of this scheme is to recognize and honor excellence in vocational training and entrepreneurship development by faculty and trainers.

schemes.name: Padma Awards
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize distinguished and exceptional achievements across various fields of public service and national importance.

schemes.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Expansion of Coffee
schemes.brief: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Expansion of Coffee" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, aims to facilitate afforestation in the Jhum lands and help settle the tribals on a permanent footing.

schemes.name: Scheme For Grant Of Rewards To The Children Of Salt Labourers
schemes.brief: The scheme “Scheme for Grant of Rewards to the Children of Salt Labourers” was launched by Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce and Industry in the year 1985.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
schemes.brief: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

schemes.name: Women’s Instinct for Developing and Ushering in Scientific Heights & Innovation
schemes.brief: 'WIDUSHI' programme aims to encourage and support senior women scientists to conduct research in interdisciplinary areas of Science and Technology.

schemes.name: Mobility Scheme
schemes.brief: The Mobility Scheme is aimed to provide an opportunity to women scientists who are facing difficulties in their present job due to relocation (marriage, transfer of husband to any other location within the country, attending ailing parents, and accompanying children studying in different city).

schemes.name: Post Graduate Indira Gandhi Scholarship For Single Girl Child
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by the University Grants Commission for Girl students who are admitted in the first year of PG courses in any designated university or a postgraduate college, and happen to be the only girl child in the family. The amount of fellowship is ₹ 36,200/- per annum.

schemes.name: National Savings Time Deposit (TD)
schemes.brief: The objective of the National Savings Time Deposit (TD) scheme is to promote safe and fixed-term savings by offering assured returns, encouraging individuals to invest regularly with flexible deposit amounts and no upper limit.

schemes.name: Financial Assistance for Tagore Cultural Complexes (TCC)
schemes.brief: This scheme promotes cultural activities across states and fosters unity while providing opportunities for creative expression and learning, especially for the youth.

schemes.name: Agnipath Yojana
schemes.brief: A welfare scheme by the Department of Military Affairs, MoD under which rigorous military training will be imparted to the youth aged between 17.5 to 23 years and meeting other educational, physical, and medical criteria, who are aspirational to be a part of the armed forces.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Virasat ka Samvardhan
schemes.brief: PM VIKAS is a Central sector scheme that focuses on socio-economic empowerment of six notified minorities in the country through skilling & training, women leadership & empowerment and education. The scheme integrates erstwhile skilling & education schemes of the Ministry of Minority Affairs.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide social security pensions to divyangjans aged 18 and above who belong to a poor family (BPL) in society.

schemes.name: Market Development Assistance
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote organic fertilizers produced at Bio-Gas and Compressed Bio-Gas plants under the Galvanizing Organic Bio-Agro Resources Dhan initiative. It provides Market Development Assistance of ₹1,500/- per Metric Tonne to manufacturing and marketing entities of organic fertilizers.

schemes.name: National Post Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.brief: The “National Post Doctoral Fellowship (N-PDF)” was launched by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Government of India to identify motivated young researchers and provide them support for doing research in frontier areas of science and engineering.

schemes.name: Right To Information Fellowship
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Personnel, Public Grievances And Pensions
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, DOPT proposes to offer four short-term fellowships to researchers from the field of media / Civil Society professionals / RTI Trainers to conduct field-based research on themes relating to RTI. It is hoped that the research output will enhance their understanding of the RTI Act.

schemes.name: Biotechnology Research Innovation And Entrepreneurship Development (Bio-RIDE)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to foster innovation, promote bio-entrepreneurship, and strengthen India's position as a global leader in biomanufacturing and biotechnology. It provides seed funding, extramural grants, and infrastructure support to startups, enterprises, industries, and academia.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: \Small Cardamom Replanting/New Planting: Karnataka (Ha.) and other States
schemes.brief: To motivate growers in Karnataka and other states to improve production and productivity through systematic replanting of diseased, old, and senile plantations, and to promote area expansion under cultivation.

schemes.name: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Fellowship
schemes.brief: INSPIRE Fellowship is one of the components of INSPIRE scheme implemented by the Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India to strengthen the Science and Technology base of the country. This Component focuses on attracting students to pursue doctoral degree.

schemes.name: Marketing Development Assistance Scheme
schemes.brief: The Marketing Development Assistance (MDA) Scheme under the Overseas Promotion & Publicity (OPP) Scheme aims to support the promotion and marketing of Indian tourism in overseas markets.

schemes.name: Biotechnology Ignition Grant Scheme
schemes.brief: The “Biotechnology Ignition Grant Scheme (BIG)” is a flagship scheme of BIRAC which recognizes and invests in innovative ideas in the biotech sector. BIG scheme supports individual entrepreneurs/ start-ups from ideation to Proof of Concept.

schemes.name: PM POSHAN - Prime Minister's Overarching Scheme For Holistic Nourishment
schemes.brief: PM POSHAN is a centrally sponsored scheme by the Department of School Education & Literacy, Ministry of Education. Under this scheme, one hot cooked meal will be provided to the children studying in Government and Government – aided schools. The Scheme is implemented by the Ministry of Education.

schemes.name: Jute Diversification Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to set up production centres to promote eco-friendly jute products and generate sustained employment. It provides skill training, machine subsidies, and financial incentives to collaborating agencies, targeting artisans, women self-help groups, and entrepreneurs.

schemes.name: Micro Finance Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.brief: Under the scheme, an amount of Rs. 1 lakh under credit Line-1 & upto  Rs. 1.5 lakh under Credit Line-2 is extended to each member of SHG (belong to Minority communities) at interest rate of 7% & 10% respectively.  Concession of 2% is extended to women beneficiaries under Credit Line-2.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive Support on JDPs
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to make Indian Jute Diversified Products globally cost-competitive and increase their export market share. It provides a financial reimbursement of up to ₹12,00,000/- per annum on raw material costs for Jute Mill Companies and MSME units engaged in exporting JDPs.

schemes.name: Term Loan Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, credit of up to ₹20,00,000/- under Credit Line-1 and up to ₹30,00,000/- under Credit line -2 is extended to beneficiaries among minority communities at 6%  p.a. & 8% p.a. respectively for financing economically viable income generation ventures.

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to support the education of Scheduled Caste students at the pre-matric stage, reduce dropouts, and improve educational participation. Through this scheme, annual academic allowances are provided to eligible Scheduled Caste students studying in Classes IX and X.

schemes.name: National Savings (Monthly Income  Account) Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme provides a fixed monthly income to investors through periodic interest payments on a one-time deposit made at the time of account opening.

schemes.name: RKVY Soil Health and Fertility - Soil Health Card
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote soil test-based nutrient management by providing Soil Health Cards containing soil analysis results and fertilizer recommendations to farmers across India.

schemes.name: Hari Om Ashram Prerit Doctor Vikram Sarabhai Research Award
schemes.brief: The Shri Hari Om Ashram Prerit Doctor Vikram Sarabhai Research Awards are biennial awards established with funds from Pujya Shri Mota of Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad, to recognize outstanding contributions by Indian scientists under the age of 45 in the fields of Space Sciences etc.

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship Students With Disabilities
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwD for students with disabilities pursuing a post-matric qualification from UGC/AICTE recognized universities, i.e. students of Class 11th, Class 12th, including Polytechnics, Post-Matriculation Diploma/Certificates and Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree/Diploma in India.

schemes.name: Top Class Education For Scheduled Caste Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The Scheme aims at recognising and promoting quality education amongst students belonging to SCs by providing financial support. The Scheme will cover SC students for pursuing studies beyond the 12th class.

schemes.name: National Talent Scholarship Undergraduate
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scholarship aims to support meritorious students by providing financial assistance of ₹3,000 per month during their undergraduate studies.

schemes.name: AICTE - Distinguished Chair Professor Fellowship
schemes.brief: The fellowship intends to utilize the expertise of highly qualified and experienced superannuated professionals who have made an unparalleled, exceptional professional contribution to society in their respective fields/disciplines.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
schemes.brief: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

schemes.name: NPS Vatsalya Scheme
schemes.brief: NPS Vatsalya is a contributory saving cum long-term financial security scheme designed exclusively for minors for the purposes of enhancing financial literacy and financial planning and to encourage empowerment of children, emanating from the vision of "Viksit Bharat@2047.

schemes.name: National Food Security Mission NFSM
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: National Food Security Mission was launched in 2007-08 to increase the production of rice, wheat and pulses. Later, coarse cereals, nutri cereals, commercial crops (sugarcane, jute, and cotton) were also added to the mission.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP)
schemes.brief: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana was launched by the Department of Pharmaceuticals, in November 2008. Under the scheme, dedicated outlets known as Janaushadhi Kendras are opened to make quality generic medicines available to all at affordable prices.

schemes.name: Pre Matric Scholarship For Students With Disabilities
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to support students with disabilities for further studies and reduce dropout rates. Through this scheme, maintenance allowance, book grant, and disability allowance are provided to eligible students with disabilities studying in Classes IX and X.

schemes.name: Vanchit Ikai Samooh aur Vargon ki Aarthik Sahayata Yojana (VISVAS) for Individual
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The VISVAS Scheme provides interest subvention on income-generating loans to SC, OBC, and Safai Karamchari individuals through Public Sector Banks, Regional Rural Banks, Private Sector Banks, Small Finance Banks, and other participating lending institutions.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to ensure old age protection for unorganised workers. It provides a minimum assured pension of ₹3,000/- per month and family pension benefits to unorganised workers aged 18 to 40 years who earn less than ₹15,000/- monthly, supported by matching government contributions.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The Kisan Credit Card (KCC) scheme was introduced in 1998 for issue of Kisan Credit Cards to farmers on the basis of their holdings for uniform adoption by the banks so that farmers may use them to readily purchase agriculture inputs and draw cash for their production needs.

schemes.name: NBCFDC General Loan Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A general loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice for Indian citizens from backward classes for various income-generating activities. Loan up to ₹15 Lakh per beneficiary for pursuing income-generating activities.

schemes.name: Scheme for Dronacharya Award for Outstanding Coaches in Sports and Games
schemes.brief: The award for Outstanding Coaches in Sports & Games is a prestigious national sports award instituted by the Government of India to recognize coaches who have consistently demonstrated outstanding & meritorious work in training sportspersons to achieve excellence at international competitions.

schemes.name: Scheme For Adolescent Girls
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to address malnutrition among adolescent girls through nutritional and non-nutritional support. Through this scheme, nutritional support, health services, nutrition education and skilling support are provided to adolescent girls aged 14-18 years in identified areas.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom:Small Cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Rain water harvesting structure (nos)
schemes.brief: Under this scheme to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation and land development by constructing rain water harvesting structures for increasing the productivity and improving quality of small cardamom.

schemes.name: Labour Welfare Scheme (Health)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide comprehensive health care and financial assistance for medical treatments. It offers hospital services, medical reimbursements, and subsistence allowances for beedi, cine, and non-coal mine workers and their dependants.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Post-Harvest Improvement: Polisher for Small Cardamom, Large Cardamom, Turmeric, etc (nos)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to encourage spice growers to adopt proper polishing methods for spices such as small cardamom, large cardamom, and turmeric to improve their appearance, quality, and marketability.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.brief: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is an old age income security scheme for a  savings account holder  in the age group of 18-40 years,  who is not an income tax-payee. It helps to address longevity risks among  workers in unorganized sector and encourages the workers to voluntarily save for retirement.

schemes.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by AICTE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for a period of max. of 3 years for first-year students and a max. of 2 years for second-year admitted students (later entry).

schemes.name: National Youth Corps
schemes.brief: A volunteership scheme by Ministry of Youth Affairs And Sports to tap the potential of the disciplined and dedicated youth In the age group of 18 to 29 years who have the inclination and spirit to engage in nation building exercises, to serve up to two years in Nation Building activities.

schemes.name: SVAMITVA Yojana (Survey of Villages and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Areas)
schemes.brief: SVAMITVA, a Central Sector scheme of Ministry of Panchayati Raj to provide ‘Record of Rights’ to village household owners with issuance of legal ownership cards (Property cards/Title deeds) to the property owners by mapping of land parcels using drone technology.

schemes.name: Health Minister’s Discretionary Grant
schemes.brief: A health scheme by Ministry of Health & Family Welfare for financially poor patients to defray a part of the expenditure on Hospitalization/treatment in Government Hospitals,for life threatening diseases covered under Rashtriya Arogya Nidhi (RAN), in cases where free medical facilities aren't there.

schemes.name: National Scheme Of Welfare Of Fishermen
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.brief: The National Scheme of Welfare of Fishermen provides financial assistance to fishermen. They can use these for constructing houses and community halls for both recreation and work purposes. Further, through the amount availed under this scheme, fishermen can install tube wells.

schemes.name: Swami Vivekananda Single Girl Child Fellowship for Research in Social Sciences
schemes.brief: A fellowship scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC) for Single Girl Child for research in Social Sciences with an aim to compensate for direct costs of higher education, especially for such girls who happen to be the only girl child in their family.

schemes.name: Krishonnati Yojana - Sub Mission On Seed And Planting Material (SMSP)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The Sub-Mission on Seeds and Planting Material (SMSP) aims to increase the production of certified / quality seed, increase SRR, upgrade the quality of farm-saved seeds, strengthen the seed multiplication chain, promote new technologies and methodologies in seed production, processing, testing, etc.

schemes.name: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Scholarship For Higher Education (SHE)
schemes.brief: The scheme "INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)" aims to attract students to study basic and natural Science subjects at undergraduate and postgraduate levels and pursue research as a career by providing scholarships to interested and deserving students.

schemes.name: Coaching Schemes For Sc/st/obc (non-creamy Layer) & Minority Students For Universities
schemes.brief: Coaching schemes for students belonging to SC (Scheduled Caste), ST (Scheduled Tribe), OBC (Other Backward Classes) (non-creamy layer), and minority communities are implemented to provide them with equal opportunities and support in pursuing higher education.

schemes.name: Internship Policy Of Indian Council For Cultural Relations (ICCR)
schemes.brief: ICCR provides an excellent opportunity for budding scholars to familiarise themselves with the role of soft power in foreign policy formulation in the Govt of India. These ‘Interns’ would be expected to supplement the process of analysis in various fields (creative writing, cultural mapping, etc).

schemes.name: Internship Programme Of The Department Of Expenditure
schemes.brief: The Internship Programme of the Department of Expenditure aims to familiarize willing and eligible undergraduates pursuing five-year integrated courses and Graduates pursuing post-Graduation/ post-Graduates pursuing Research with the overall process of formulation of economic policies of the Govt.

schemes.name: Free Coaching for SCs, OBCs and beneficiaries of PM CARES Children Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: To provide high-quality free coaching to economically disadvantaged Scheduled Castes (SCs), Other Backward Classes (OBCs), and eligible beneficiaries of the PM CARES Children Scheme for competitive exams in public and private sector employment and admission into professional courses.

schemes.name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation
schemes.brief: The scheme "Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, aims to improve the production and productivity of coffee plantations by encouraging water augmentation in traditional areas.

schemes.name: FutureSkills Prime Incentive Program
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote a novel skilling ecosystem in the country, the programme/scheme would incentivize the cost of the eligible course(s) concerned, providing authentic and accredited certifications that are acceptable in the industry.

schemes.name: Padho Pardesh
schemes.brief: Padho Pardesh is a scheme of interest subsidy on educational loans for overseas studies for the students belonging to the minority communities. The scheme was launched by the Ministry of Minority Affairs in 2006 under the Prime Minister's New 15 Point Programme for the Welfare of Minorities.

schemes.name: National Scholarship For Post Graduate Studies
schemes.brief: A scheme started by Ministry of Education for the student Higher education.

schemes.name: Swarnajayanti Fellowships Scheme
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, a selected number of young scientists, with proven track record, are provided special assistance and support to enable them to pursue basic research in frontier areas of science and technology.

schemes.name: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRAC’s E-YUVA Fellows (for under graduate students)
schemes.brief: BIRAC’s E-YUVA Fellows shall apply as a team and pursue their research work at their College/University labs and will also be allowed access to facilities at EYC and EYC Knowledge Partners as and when required.

schemes.name: Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The “Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme (CPIS)” is being implemented by the Coconut Development Board, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Government of India with the objective of insuring coconut palms against natural calamities, climatic risks, pests, diseases, and other perils.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan Yojana: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme provides full interest subsidy during the moratorium period on loan availed under Model Education Loan Scheme of Indian Banks’ Association (IBA) to students belonging to economically weaker sections whose annual parental income is up to ₹4.5 Lakhs from all sources.

schemes.name: National Youth Award
schemes.brief: This award is to motivate young persons to achieve excellence in the field of national development or social service and to develop in them a sense of responsibility to the community and thus to improve their potential as good citizens.

schemes.name: PM-YASASVI: Top Class School Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to provide premium education to the meritorious students belonging to OBC, EBC, and DNT categories by funding their education from Class 9 onwards till they complete Class 12.

schemes.name: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
schemes.brief: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

schemes.name: Group Insurance Scheme for Powerloom Weavers
schemes.brief: The basic objective of this scheme is to provide insurance cover to the powerloom weavers in the case of natural death, accidental death as well as partial and permanent disability due to accident.

schemes.name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana
schemes.brief: The KVPY is a national fellowship program in basic sciences, initiated and funded by the Department of Science and Technology to attract exceptionally motivated students to pursue basic science courses and a research career in science.

schemes.name: National Awards to Teachers
schemes.brief: "National Awards to Teachers" aims to celebrate the contributions of outstanding teachers and enhance the quality of school education. This award provides public recognition and honours the commitment of teachers, benefiting meritorious teachers working in primary, middle, and secondary schools.

schemes.name: ICSSR Post-Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.brief: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) offers Postdoctoral Fellowships to encourage original and quality research by young and mid-career scholars in the field of social sciences. It is designed for researchers who have just finished their Ph.D. in advanced social science research.

schemes.name: ICSSR Senior Fellowship
schemes.brief: The Indian Council of Social scientific Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, offers a Senior Fellowship Scheme designed to assist accomplished Indian researchers in conducting advanced social science research.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan Yojana - Special Scholarship Scheme for Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh
schemes.brief: This initiative provides academic fees and maintenance allowances to support students from Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh pursuing higher education outside the Union Territories

schemes.name: PM-Special Training of Geriatric Caregivers
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to train and create a professional cadre of geriatric caregivers to meet the increasing demand for specialized care for senior citizens. It offers skill development and certification in geriatric care job roles to Indian citizens, ensuring professional services for the elderly.

schemes.name: Support for Marginalized Individuals for Livelihood and Enterprise (SMILE): Composite Medical Health for Transgender Persons
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide health Insurance coverage to all Transgender persons living in India to improve their health condition through proper treatment including sex re-assignment surgeries as well as medical support. The scheme provides health insurance in the form of Ayushman Bharat Plus.

schemes.name: Samriddhi – Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Students for Setting Start-Ups
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide opportunities for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe students to design, launch, and run their own business or startup after formal education is completed or during their final year of education. The scheme provides a limited one-time financial assistance of ₹20,00,000/-.

schemes.name: Information, Monitoring, Evaluation and Social Audit (I-MESA): Project Monitoring Unit (PMU)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to intensely examine the implementation of schemes at the ground level and monitor scheme outputs and outcomes to ensure the quality of services being provided under these schemes. The scheme component provides for physical inspection of every scheme of the Ministry.

schemes.name: AVYAY - National Action Plan for Senior Citizens: Health and Shelter for Senior Citizens
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to improve the quality of life of Senior Citizens, particularly those who are indigent, by providing basic amenities like shelter, food, medical care and entertainment opportunities. The scheme provides financial assistance for projects such as maintenance of Senior Citizen Homes.

schemes.name: Information-Monitoring, Evaluation, and Social Audit (I-MESA): Social Audit
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to ensure transparency and accountability in the implementation of schemes. It provides a process for accumulating and analyzing beneficiary feedback for scheme improvement, ensuring people's participation, and offering a platform for timely grievance redressal for right holders.

schemes.name: UGC-BSR Faculty Fellowship Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to strengthen basic science research by allowing talented professors nearing superannuation to continue research and mentor Ph.D. students. It provides a monthly fellowship and an annual research grant for 3 years.

schemes.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to award scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest their drop out at class VIII and encourage them to continue their education at secondary stage.

schemes.name: National Handloom Development Programme (NHDP): Scholarship Component
schemes.brief: The scheme targets the children of these weavers, offering financial assistance of up to ₹2,00,000/- annually. This support covers tuition, admission, and examination fees at recognised textile institutions. Additionally, beneficiaries receive a monthly stipend of ₹5,000/-.

schemes.name: Gallantry Medal – PMG/GM
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to honour exceptional and conspicuous acts of gallantry. Through this scheme, medals, a Presidential scroll, and monthly monetary allowances are provided to eligible service personnel.

schemes.name: Skill Development and Training of Candidates in Technical Textiles
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to train skilled professionals for the technical textiles industry, develop transferable skills, create a strong knowledge ecosystem, integrate trained individuals into various roles, and promote continuous learning and innovation.

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission – Grameen PHASE I
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to eliminate open defecation and improve rural sanitation by supporting toilet construction and promoting usage among poor and marginalized rural households.

schemes.name: Technical Internship Programme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide practical technical experience through live projects. Under this programme, a 6-month internship with a stipend of ₹20,000/- per month is offered to eligible engineering students.

schemes.name: Vikaas-Day Care Scheme For Person with Disability Children
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: Vikaas is a Day care scheme, primarily to expand the range of opportunities available to a person with disability attaining the age of 10 years for enhancing interpersonal and vocational skills as they are on a transition to higher age groups.

schemes.name: SITARE-Appreciation Grant
schemes.brief: SITARE-Appreciation Grant: Residential workshops called as Biotech Innovation Ignition School (BIIS) for undergraduate students are organized to provide hands-on technical training and mentorship for problem identification in 3-4 weeks duration.

schemes.name: National Science Chair- Scientific Excellence
schemes.brief: The main aim of the scheme is to recognize active eminent senior resident Indian superannuated scientists for their outstanding contributions both nationally and internationally, in the areas of Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics (STEM) & Medicine, to promote excellence and growth in R&D.

schemes.name: National Science Chair- Science Leadership
schemes.brief: The main aim of the scheme is to recognise active eminent senior resident Indian superannuated scientists for their outstanding contributions both nationally and internationally, in the areas of Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics (STEM) & Medicine, to promote excellence and growth in R&D.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar
schemes.brief: The objective of the Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar (RVP) is to recognise the notable and inspiring contribution made by the scientists, technologists and innovators individually or in teams in various fields of science, technology and technology- led innovation.

schemes.name: National Awards To Teachers (Higher Education)
schemes.brief: The purpose of National Awards to Teachers is to celebrate the unique contribution of some of the finest teachers in the country and to honor those teachers who through their commitment and industry have not only improved the quality of school education but also enriched the lives of their students.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Khel Protsahan Puraskar
schemes.brief:
This scheme was launched by the Dept. of Sports. There are four categories of awards:
(a)	Identification and nurturing of budding/young talent
(b)	Encouragement to sports through Corporate Social Responsibility
(c)	Employment of sports persons and sports welfare measures
(d)	Sports for Development

schemes.name: Jeevan Raksha Padak Series of Awards
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize bravery in saving lives and provide medals, certificates, and financial allowances to deserving individuals.

schemes.name: Top Class Education For Students With Disabilities
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwDs for Students with Disabilities (SwDs) pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the 'notified institutions'.

schemes.name: National Gopal Ratna Award
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote scientific dairy practices and AI coverage. It provides awards, recognition, and monetary incentives to farmers, dairy organizations, and AI technicians.

schemes.name: President’s Medal for Distinguished Service
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize exceptional service, distinguished records, and meritorious contributions in police, security, fire, prison, and civil defence services.

schemes.name: National Metallurgist Award
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, outstanding metallurgical contributions are recognized, and excellence in operations, R&D, waste management, and energy conservation is promoted.

schemes.name: National CSR Awards
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to promote excellence in CSR activities, encourage effective use of CSR funds, and ensure that benefits reach marginalized and remote communities.

schemes.name: Sagar Samman Award- Sagar Samman Award for Gallantry
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, recognition is provided to Indian seafarers who risk their lives to save others or protect the marine environment.

schemes.name: Coir Udyami Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.brief: The scheme "Coir Udyami Yojana" by the Coir Board, Ministry of MSME, Government of India, aims to modernize the coir industry and generate rural employment. It offers credit-linked financial assistance to establish coir units by eligible applicants.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide fixed-day assured, comprehensive and quality antenatal care universally to all pregnant women in 2nd and 3rd trimester on the 9th of every month. It offers free comprehensive antenatal care services at government health facilities.

schemes.name: Indo-French Visiting/Mobility Programme for Women in Science
schemes.brief: This programme will encourage women candidates to work with the Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

schemes.name: Nari Shakti Puraskar - National Award for Women
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: The award aims to acknowledge the achievements of women & recognize their contributions to society and the nation. The award is conferred annually on individuals in recognition of their exceptional service towards the cause of women’s empowerment, particularly for vulnerable and marginalized women.

schemes.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation
schemes.brief: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation" aims to improve the productivity and quality of coffee by facilitating the creation of infrastructure for water augmentation for irrigation and wet processing of coffee.

schemes.name: ICAR - Post Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribes Candidates
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Castes/ Scheduled Tribes candidates for study at Bachelor Degree programme in various branches of Agriculture, viz. B.Sc. (Agri.), B.V.Sc., B.Sc. (Agril. Engg.), B.Sc. (Home Science), B.F.Sc., B.Sc. (Forestry) etc.

schemes.name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Vocational Training Of Widows Of ESM
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to widows of ex-servicemen to help them become self-reliant through vocational training.

schemes.name: The Inland Waterways Authority of India Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The purpose of this scheme is to provide with Selected Candidates” short term exposure to different verticals/ divisions/ units of IWAI as “Interns”. An intern may be required to work at Head Office or Project Office depending upon the requirement of the Authority.

schemes.name: Travel Grant Scheme for College Teachers/Vice Chancellors/Commission Members
schemes.brief: This scheme is for providing financial assistance to permanent teachers of colleges & vice-chancellors of state universities, deemed to be universities & central universities, recognised under section 2(f) and 12 (B) of the UGC Act, to present research papers at international conferences abroad.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme (PLI 1.2) for Specialty Steel
schemes.brief: under this scheme to promote domestic manufacturing of specialty steel by encouraging incremental investment, increasing production of value-added steel, enhancing technological capabilities, and reducing import dependence while generating employment.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Export Oriented Production:Large Cardamom Replanting/New planting (Ha)
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, growers are encouraged to adopt systematic replanting of large cardamom using high-yielding, disease-free planting materials. It aims to increase productivity, improve quality, and enhance export competitiveness under the Spices Board of India.

schemes.name: National Savings Recurring Deposit Account(RD)
schemes.brief: The objective of the National Savings Recurring Deposit (RD) scheme is to encourage people to save small amounts regularly every month and build savings with safe returns at 6.7% per annum.

schemes.name: Post Office Savings Account(SB)
schemes.brief: The objective of the Post Office Savings Account (SB) scheme is to encourage people to save money safely with the government. It offers easy access, a low minimum balance of ₹500, and steady interest, helping individuals build regular saving habits.

schemes.name: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
schemes.brief: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India has announced the scheme for incentives for nutritional support to TB patients. This scheme will be called “Nikshay Poshan Yojana”.

schemes.name: Award Of Scholarships To Young Artists In Different Cultural Fields
schemes.brief: This Scheme seeks to give assistance to young artistes of outstanding promise for advanced training within India in the field of Indian Classical Music, Indian Classical Dance, Theatre, Mime, Visual art, Folk, Traditional and Indigenous Arts and Light Classical Music.

schemes.name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Degree)
schemes.brief: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

schemes.name: ICRO Amrit Internship Programme
schemes.brief: The IPL Centre for Rural Outreach (ICRO) has launched ICRO Amrit Internship Programme focused on youth productivity for prosperity. The interns will be placed at the headquarters and Regional Offices of NPC/ IPL. The duration of the internship will be 3 months initially, renewable up to four times.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom:Large cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Irrigation / water storage structures(nos)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation by constructing water storage structures, rain water harvesting structures and installation of irrigation equipments for increasing the productivity and improving quality of large cardamom.

schemes.name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship Program
schemes.brief: Begum Hazrat Mahal National scholarship is a scholarship scheme also known as Maulana Azad National scholarship scheme was first announced on 3rd May 2003. It is a national level scholarship started for the benefit of the girl’s student belonging to the minority communities.

schemes.name: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Caste Etc. Candidates
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by MoSJE for regular, full-time students from Scheduled Castes, Denotified Nomadic and Semi Nomadic Tribes, Landless Agricultural Labourers and Traditional Artisans; to obtain higher education viz., Master degree or Ph.D courses by studying abroad

schemes.name: Domestic Funding Of Foreign Training
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Personnel, Public Grievances And Pensions
schemes.brief: The scheme "Domestic Funding of Foreign Training (DFFT)" is a scheme introduced by the Department of Personnel and Training, Government of India in the year 2001-02 with an objective to upgrade the knowledge & skills of Government officers.

schemes.name: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research
schemes.brief: The scheme “Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER)” aims to build scientific capacity, retain and promote women researchers in India & Germany by utilizing complementary expertise in science, technology, innovation and research partnerships.

schemes.name: Craftsmen Training Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to ensure steady flow of skilled workers in different trades for domestic industry and reduce unemployment among educated youth. It provides systematic vocational training through Industrial Training Institutes and National Skill Training Institutes across India.

schemes.name: Internship Scheme Of The Department Of Economic Affairs
schemes.brief: The Internship Scheme aims to familiarise students with macro-economic policy formulation and economic research. Through this scheme, internship opportunities with token remuneration are provided to eligible Post Graduate and PhD students.

schemes.name: Mass Communication Internship Programme
schemes.brief: The Mass Communication Internship Programme by the Department of Water Resources, River Development, and Ganga Rejuvenation. The intern program will offer work culture and environment knowledge about the functioning of the Government and its departments in information, education, and communication.

schemes.name: Promotion of Exportable surplus of identified spices in NE: Cultivation of Lakadong turmeric (Ha)
schemes.brief: To promote the cultivation of Lakadong turmeric for exports by providing 50% of the cost of planting material, subject to a maximum of ₹ 30,000 per Ha, to turmeric growers of the North East having land holding size of 0.10 Ha to 8 Ha.

schemes.name: Nyaya Mitra Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to facilitate the expeditious disposal of ten to fifteen years old pending court cases. It provides legal advice, case assistance, and Lok Adalat referrals to marginalized litigants by engaging retired officers.

schemes.name: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme for the Wards of Central Armed Police Forces & Assam Rifles
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to encourage higher technical and professional education for dependent wards and widows of CAPFs/Assam Rifles personnel martyred during Terror/Naxal attacks. Through this scheme, Financial support per year for girls and boys is provided.

schemes.name: Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme (VCIS) by the University of Delhi aims to provide students with experiential learning opportunities, integrating academic knowledge with practical work experience. This initiative aligns with the objectives of "Samagra Shiksha" (holistic education) as outlined..

schemes.name: Agri-Clinics And Agri-Business Centres Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: A welfare scheme by the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare was launched in 2002. AC&ABC aims at agricultural development, supplementing the efforts of public extension by providing extension and other services to farmers either on a payment basis or free of cost as per the business model.

schemes.name: Virasat Loan Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.brief: Concessional credit of up to ₹10,00,000/- can be availed under Credit Line-1 & 2.  to meet Working Capital  and Fixed Capital for purchase of equipment/tools/machineries/raw material by the Minority Artisan.

schemes.name: Summer Internship Programme (PRL)
schemes.brief: The Physical Research Laboratory (PRL) Summer Internship Programme aims to provide a platform for highly motivated students & teachers to interact with PRL’s scientists, gaining exposure to the lab’s research areas and facilities. Participants will work on projects in fundamental science, technology

schemes.name: INAE Travel Grant Scheme for Engineering Students from IITs/NITs/Govt. Approved Engineering Colleges/Institutions other than AICTE
schemes.brief: A Travel Grant Scheme by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and by the Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE), for the students from AICTE approved Engineering College/institutions. The scheme aims at enhancing the quality of engineering education in the country.

schemes.name: National Overseas Scholarship For Students With Disabilities
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment for regular, full-time students with disabilities to obtain higher education viz., Master's degree, or Ph.D. courses from foreign universities, in one of the specified fields of study.

schemes.name: Emeritus Fellowship
schemes.brief: The University Grants Commission floated the Scheme of “Emeritus Fellowship” to provide an opportunity to the superannuated teachers who have been actively engaged in research and teaching programmes in the preceding years to undertake research, without any restriction of position or pay scales.

schemes.name: National Mission on Natural Farming
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote natural farming practices through capacity building, training, certification, and financial assistance for on-farm input production infrastructure, thereby reducing cultivation costs and increasing farmers' income.

schemes.name: Financial Assistance For Procuring Mobility Equipment To Disabled Ex-Servicemen (All Ranks)
schemes.brief: The scheme provides financial assistance of a maximum of ₹ 1,00,000 from the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund (AFFDF) for the procurement of modified scooters, crutches and wheelchairs for Ex-Servicemen who are disabled after their retirement from service with a disability of 50% or more.

schemes.name: NDRI Institute Scholarship For M.Sc. And Ph.d
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to eligible Indian students admitted to M.Sc. (Dairying) and Ph.D. (Dairying) programmes at NDRI through monthly scholarships during the prescribed period of study.

schemes.name: Social Security for Tea Plantation Workers in Assam
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide institutionalized social security cover, including provident funds, pensions, and life insurance. It provides monthly pensions, provident fund advances, and lump-sum death benefits to tea plantation workers in Assam and their dependent families.

schemes.name: Free Coaching for Students with Disabilities
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A Scheme "Free Coaching for Students with Disabilities" was initiated by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities under the "Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment".

schemes.name: Employees' Pension Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme ensures retirement security for employees covered under the EPF Act, offering monthly pensions, family pensions, and withdrawal benefits. It targets workers in organised sectors, providing financial support post-retirement, during disability, or to dependents after the member’s death.

schemes.name: Khelo India Scheme: Sports Competitions and Talent Development
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to encourage sports participation, identify and nurture sporting talent, and provide development opportunities through sports competitions, talent development programmes, and community coaching initiatives across India.

schemes.name: Senior Citizens Saving Scheme
schemes.brief: Introduced in 2004 by the Govt. of India, SCSS offers a steady stream of income for individuals over 60 years old. As it is a government-backed scheme, there is minimal risk associated with SCSS. Individuals can apply for this scheme in post offices and public and private banks.

schemes.name: National Fellowship For OBC Students
schemes.brief: "National Fellowship for OBC Students" was launched by the University Grants Commission (UGC) during the financial year 2014-15 to increase the opportunities for the students of Other Backward Classes (OBCs) to pursue higher education leading to acquiring degrees such as M.Phil. and Ph.D.

schemes.name: Junior Research Fellowship In Engineering & Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme "Junior Research Fellowship in Engineering & Technology" by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education is meant for candidates who wish to pursue research leading to a Ph.D. degree in engineering and technology.

schemes.name: Dr. S. Radhakrishnan UGC Post-Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.brief: The scheme "Dr. S. Radhakrishnan UGC Post-Doctoral Fellowship" is a fellowship scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education (DoHE). Post-doctoral research is an important enabling step in grooming young researchers for launching an academic/research career.

schemes.name: AICTE-Swanath Scholarship Scheme For Students
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by the Student Development Cell (StDC) of All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) to provide encouragement and support to orphans, wards of parents who died due to Covid-19, wards of Armed Forces, and Central Paramilitary Forces martyred in action (Shaheed).

schemes.name: Indian Agricultural Research Institute - Scholarship
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Junior and Senior Scholarship shall be awarded to M.Sc. and Ph.D. students admitted under General Open Competition Scheme.

schemes.name: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Internship
schemes.brief: INSPIRE INTERNSHIP aims to provide exposure to the top 1% of students at the Class X Board level by organizing Science Camps either during summer or winter which provides an opportunity for them to interact with Science icons from India and abroad, including Nobel Laureates.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana: Per Drop More Crop
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme “Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana: Per Drop More Crop” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Govt. of India on 1st July 2015. The scheme mainly focuses on water use efficiency at farm level through Micro Irrigation.

schemes.name: Internship Scheme By The Unique Identification Authority Of India (UIDAI)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The Internship Scheme by the UIDAI enables the students to gain adequate exposure to various Technology tracks and other units within UIDAI Headquarters, Technology Centre and Regional offices. It would be expected to work in the field of application development, legal domains (cyber laws/IT) etc.

schemes.name: SEBI ITD Internship Program
schemes.brief: The SEBI ITD Internship Program provides hands-on training to the students of the institutes based in and around Mumbai. The program accepts up to 15 interns. The Interns accepted under this program would be given an opportunity to work on different Information Technology (IT) projects.

schemes.name: Security Related Expenditure (Relief and Rehabilitation)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to support the relief and rehabilitation of the Kashmiri migrants who have been uprooted from the Valley during the militancy period besides other relief & rehabilitation measures. "SRE (R&R) Scheme" is a component of the Umbrella scheme, 'Modernization of Police Forces (MPF)".

schemes.name: Niramaya Health Insurance Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: Niramaya Health Insurance Scheme ,launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, aims to provide affordable health insurance to the Persons with Disabilities (PwDs).

schemes.name: International Centre for Environment Audit and Sustainable Development (iCED)
schemes.ministry: Comptroller And Auditor General Of India
schemes.brief: The "International Centre for Environment Audit and Sustainable Development (iCED)" scheme provides a platform to young students pursuing courses in Ocean Science, Environmental Science, Environment Management, Environment Audit, etc. to help develop awareness about the work of iCED with special.

schemes.name: Establishment of Entrepreneur for Breed Development in Small Ruminant Sector (Sheep and Goat Farming)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.brief: The scheme for the "Establishment of Entrepreneurs for Breed Development in the Small Ruminant Sector (Sheep and Goat Farming)" falls under the Sub-mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry. The Entrepreneurs / Eligible Entities can establish sheep and goat breeding unit.

schemes.name: ICSSR International Collaboration
schemes.brief: The Indian Council of Social scientific Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, offers a Travel Grant for participation in International Conference abroad. The aim of this programme is to assist invited social science scholars to make substantial contributions to international seminars/co
tags: Develop New Insights And Enlarge Research Perspective

schemes.name: Scheme of Grant-in-Aid for Professional Associations/ Organisations of Social Scientists including Universities, Colleges and Research Institutes for Publication/ Running of their Research Journal(s)
schemes.brief: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, provides Grants-in-Aid to professional associations, organisations of social scientists, universities, colleges, and research institutes

schemes.name: Scheme of Publication Grant/Subsidy for Publication of Doctoral Thesis/Research Report/ Papers Presented in Seminars/Conferences, etc.
schemes.brief: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, provides financial assistance for the publication of high-quality doctoral theses, research project/fellowship reports, and seminar/conference papers in the field of social sciences.

schemes.name: RMEWF- Financial Assistance to Orphan Children of ESM
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, ₹3,000 per month (paid annually) is provided to eligible orphan children of ex-servicemen for educational and settlement support.

schemes.name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme for Implementation of the Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955 and the Scheduled Castes and the Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to ensure effective implementation of Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955 and Prevention of Atrocities Act, 1989. It provides relief, rehabilitation, and support to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes victims of atrocities and incentives for inter-caste marriages.

schemes.name: Scheme of Assistance to State Scheduled Castes Development Corporations
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide economic development assistance to Scheduled Castes living below the poverty line through financial support and credit facilitation. It provides share capital, margin money loans, and subsidies to Scheduled Castes families for employment-oriented schemes.

schemes.name: PM Janjati Adivasi Nyaya Maha Abhiyan (PM JANMAN)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to improve the socio-economic status of PVTGs by saturating families and habitations with basic facilities and services. It provides 11 critical infrastructure and welfare interventions, including housing, water, electricity, and connectivity.

schemes.name: Prime Minister’s Rural Development Fellows Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide short term catalytic support to the District Administration in backward districts to improve programme delivery and simultaneously develop a cadre of Development Facilitators. Fellows receive professional experience, structured learning, and a monthly stipend.

schemes.name: Ambedkar Social Innovation and Incubation Mission (ASIIM)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to boost entrepreneurship and innovation among SC students and SC differently-abled youth by providing focused support to translate innovative, technology-oriented business ideas into successful commercial enterprises. It offers equity funding and hand-holding support.

schemes.name: AICTE – Mitacs Globalink Research Internship (GRI) Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote collaborative research between India and Canada. Through this scheme, fully funded international research internships are provided to eligible Indian undergraduate students.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for the Wards/Widows of Central Police Force Personnel
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to encourage higher technical and professional education for the wards of widows and ex-CPF personnel. Service conditions of Central Police Forces (CPFs) Personnel are extremely exacting, tough, rigorous, and peculiar to the Services.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Pharmaceuticals
schemes.brief: The scheme provides financial incentives on the incremental sales (over Base Year) of pharmaceutical goods and in-vitro diagnostic medical devices to selected applicants based on pre-defined selection criteria. The applicant must be a manufacturer of pharmaceutical goods.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Export Oriented Production: Large Cardamom Certified Nursery (Unit)
schemes.brief: The scheme "Export Oriented Production: Large Cardamom Certified Nursery (Unit)" is a Sub-Scheme of the Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom by the Spice Board, Department of Commerce and Industry, Ministry of Commerce.

schemes.name: Ramanujan Fellowship
schemes.brief: "Ramanujan Fellowship" was started by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Govt. of India for brilliant Indian scientists and engineers from outside India to take up scientific research positions in India, those Indian scientists/engineers who want to return to India from abroad.

schemes.name: Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm-UGC
schemes.brief: University Grants Commission is implementing the scheme of Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm courses (including integrated dual degree courses).

schemes.name: High Risk - High Reward Research
schemes.brief: The Scheme for Funding "High Risk - High Reward Research" aims at supporting proposals that are conceptually new & risky, & if successful, expected to have a paradigm-shifting influence on the S&T.

schemes.name: Disha - Early Intervention and School Readiness Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: This scheme aims at setting up Disha Centres for early intervention for Person with Disability (PwD) in 0-10 years of age covered under the National Trust Act, through therapies, trainings and providing support to family members.

schemes.name: Free Coaching Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide good coaching quality for DNT candidates to enable them to appear in competitive examinations and succeed in obtaining an appropriate job in the Public/Private Sector.

schemes.name: National Agriculture Insurance Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The National Agriculture Insurance Scheme (NAIS) was introduced by the Government of India to provide comprehensive insurance coverage and financial support to farmers against crop losses due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.

schemes.name: Youth Hostel Scheme
schemes.brief: The Youth Hostel Scheme is a joint venture of the Central and State Governments of India. It was launched in the early 1960s to promote youth travel within the country by providing low-cost budget accommodation and facilities to students and youth groups traveling on excursions or study tours.
