schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide old-age social security through a minimum assured monthly pension of ₹ 3,000/- to Small and Marginal Farmers after attaining the age of 60 years.

schemes.name: ICAR Senior Research Fellowship For Post-Graduate Studies In Agricultural Sciences
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: ICAR awards a certain number of Senior Research Fellowships for Ph.D. in an Agricultural University (AU), in different disciplines of agriculture and allied sciences. This is done to encourage talented students to undertake higher agricultural education.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Dakshta Aur Kushalta Sampann Hitgrahi (PM-DAKSH)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme "PM-DAKSH", launched by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment (MoSJ&E), aims to empower socially, educationally, and economically marginalized groups like SCs, OBCs, EWS, DNTs, Safai Mitras, and Waste Pickers by enhancing their skills through high-quality training.

schemes.name: Nari Adalat
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide an alternative grievance redressal mechanism for women at the grassroots level through mediation, counselling, and awareness of rights and entitlements.

schemes.name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide completely free and cashless delivery, including caesarean section, for pregnant women at government health facilities along with free treatment for sick newborns and infants.

schemes.name: Logistics Excellence, Advancement, and Performance Shield
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to acknowledge and celebrate best practices and innovations in the logistics industry across sectors. It also aims to promote sustainability, efficiency, and technological advancement in alignment with national logistics initiatives.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Award for Yoga
schemes.brief: The purpose of the Award is to recognize and felicitate individual(s)/ organization(s) who have made a significant impact on society for a sustained period by way of promotion and development of Yoga

schemes.name: Tagore National Fellowship for Cultural Research
schemes.brief: The Scheme has been introduced to invigorate and revitalize the various institutions under the Ministry of Culture and other identified cultural institutions in the country, by encouraging Fellows/academicians to affiliate themselves with these institutions to work on projects of mutual interest.

schemes.name: Entrepreneurship and Skill Development Programme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship and skill development among youth by providing training and support for setting up MSMEs and self-employment ventures.

schemes.name: NPC Students Internship Program
schemes.brief: National Productivity Council (NPC) provides internship training to students pursuing graduation and post-graduation. The interns shall be given exposure to related interventions being activities undertaken by NPC which will provide opportunities to learn and implement new concepts.

schemes.name: ICMR- Post Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.brief: ICMR- Post Doctoral Fellowship (ICMR-PDF) Scheme is being instituted to foster high-quality research opportunities for promising fresh Ph.D./MD/MS holders in the areas of basic science, communicable and non-communicable diseases, & reproductive health including nutrition at ICMR Institutes/Centers.

schemes.name: National Renewable Energy Fellowship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemes.brief: Through this scheme, fellowships will be provided for pursuing higher studies/ advanced research in renewable energy. The fellowship scheme is directly aligned with the overall requirement of renewable energy, research thrust areas identified by MNRE.

schemes.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Quality Upgradation / Certification: Drying Yards
schemes.brief: The scheme "Quality Upgradation / Certification: Drying Yards" aims to facilitate the improvement of the quality of coffee produced by growers by encouraging them to establish infrastructure for quality enhancement and obtain certification for their coffees, enabling them to earn better returns.

schemes.name: Pratyaksh Hanstantrit Labh / Direct Benefits Transfer For LPG
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.brief: PAHAL (DBTL) has been introduced to curb the diversion of subsidized LPG. Under the scheme, Consumers will pay the market price for the domestic cylinder and the subsidy will be transferred directly to their bank account

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Education Loan
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide education loans to the students from the community of safai karamcharis\manual scavengers & their dependents for pursuing higher education.

schemes.name: WISE Fellowship for Ph.D.
schemes.brief: The "WISE Fellowship for Ph.D. (WISE-PhD)" of the Department of Science and Technology aims to provide an opportunity to carry out Doctoral research in basic and applied sciences to women scientists and technologists between the age group of 27-45 years who want to pursue research in STEM fields.

schemes.name: Internship Programme At Serious Fraud Investigation Office
schemes.brief: The Internship Programme at SFIO was started in 2017 to provide a platform for the interaction of talented and young scholars and researchers from reputed academic institutions who are pursuing Post-Graduation/Research Programs in Economics/ Commerce/Law/ Management and Computer Forensics, etc.

schemes.name: Women Helpline
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: "Women Helpline" provides 24X7 emergency and non-emergency response through the telephonic short-code 181 to women

schemes.name: CBSE Merit Scholarship Scheme For Single Girl Child
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote girls’ education and provide ₹1,000 per month to meritorious single girl students studying in classes 11th and 12th.

schemes.name: The Operation of Production Linked Incentive Scheme (PLI) for Large Scale Electronics Manufacturing
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives to boost domestic manufacturing and attract large investments in the electronics value chain, including electronic components and semiconductor packaging.

schemes.name: Public Provident Fund Account(PPF)
schemes.brief: The objective of the Public Provident Fund (PPF) scheme is to promote regular savings by offering a safe, long-term investment with good interest rates, encouraging financial security and disciplined saving habits.

schemes.name: Museum Grant Scheme
schemes.brief: Under this scheme provide financial support for establishing new museums, upgrading and modernizing existing ones, promoting digitization of collections, and enhancing the skills of museum professionals across regional, state, and district levels.

schemes.name: MANAGE Internship Programme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: MANAGE Internship Programme is open to students from the disciplines of Extension Education, Economics, Sociology, Psychology, MSW, Journalism, Communication, and Environmental Science. The internships are open year-round, and the duration ranges from 3 months upto 6 months.

schemes.name: TEC Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The ‘TEC Internship Scheme’ intends to engage 25 Interns in order to study/formulate/operationalize/assess various works/projects/policies etc. The internship will provide an opportunity for young scholars to contribute to the TEC work and have insight into the related technical work.

schemes.name: ICAR Junior Research Fellowship For Post-Graduate Studies In Agricultural Sciences
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: ICAR awards a certain number of Junior Research Fellowships for Postgraduate Studies (course and research work) leading to a Master’s degree, in different disciplines of agriculture and allied sciences. This is done to encourage talented students to undertake higher agricultural education.

schemes.name: Long Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research
schemes.brief: Long Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research aims to provide advanced training in India and abroad to medical and health research personnel in cutting-edge research areas related to medicine and health.

schemes.name: Food Safety & Standards Authority Of India (FSSAI) Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The Internship Program by the FSSAI provides interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. FSSAI is a statutory body established under the Food Safety & Standards Act, 2006 under the aegis of the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

schemes.name: Large cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Irrigation equipment (nos)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation by constructing water storage structures, rain water harvesting structures and installation of irrigation equipments for increasing the productivity and improving quality of large cardamom.

schemes.name: Large cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Rainwater harvesting structure(nos)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation by constructing water storage structures, rain water harvesting structures and installation of irrigation equipments for increasing the productivity and improving quality of large cardamom

schemes.name: Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant For Newly Recruited Faculty Members
schemes.brief: The scheme "Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant for Newly Recruited Faculty Members" is a research grant scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education (DoHE). The purpose of the research grant is to provide opportunities to regularly appointed faculty members.

schemes.name: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Environment,forests and climate change
schemes.brief: The Scheme seeks to engage students, with Graduation/Postgraduation Degrees, as well as Research Scholars, enrolled in recognized Universities / Institutions within India, or abroad, as “Interns”. These "Interns" shall be inducted all over the country in various Divisions/Units of the Ministry.

schemes.name: Petrochemicals Research & Innovation Commendation
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to felicitate meritorious innovations in petrochemicals. It provides a citation, a memento, and Travel Allowance and Dearness Allowance for attending the ceremony to eligible Indian citizens, institutions, industries, and start-ups.

schemes.name: Scheme For Arjuna Awards For Outstanding Performance In Sports And Games
schemes.brief: The objective of Arjuna Awards is to recognize outstanding achievements of sportspersons in the field of sports at the international level. To be eligible for the award, a sportsperson should have good performance consistently for the previous four years at the international level.

schemes.name: Chemical Promotion Development Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to facilitate the growth and development of the chemicals and petrochemicals industry through knowledge creation, dissemination, and excellence awards. It provides Grants-in-Aid to organisations and industry associations for conducting studies, seminars, and workshops.

schemes.name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students for studying in India
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to OBC students studying at the post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education. These scholarships shall be available for studies in India only and will be disbursed via Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemes.name: Paired Early Career Fellowship in Applied Research
schemes.brief: PECFAR is a fellowship to facilitate a two-way exchange of young early-career Indian and German researchers through short visits for networking and exploring avenues for collaboration and innovation in applied research.

schemes.name: Central Sector Scheme of National Fellowship for Providing Fellowship to Scheduled Caste Students to Pursue M.Phil. & PhD
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme provides opportunities to Scheduled Castes students to pursue higher education leading to M.Phil/Ph.D degrees in Sciences, Humanities and Social Science streams. The objective of the scheme is to provide fellowships in the form of financial assistance to SC students.

schemes.name: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRAC’s Innovation Fellows (for post graduates and above)
schemes.brief: BIRAC’s Innovation fellows shall apply as an individual and are required to work full time at EYC. BIRAC’s Innovation Fellows are expected to initiate biotech startups. Hence, only proposals with potential to commercialize innovative products and technologies will be considered for support.

schemes.name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Ex-Servicemen In Penury
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial relief to destitute non-pensioner Ex-Servicemen and their widows. Through this scheme, financial assistance per month (paid annually) is provided for lifetime support.

schemes.name: Junior Research Fellowship
schemes.brief: The Department of Biotechnology, Ministry of Science & Technology, Government of India provides fellowships for pursuing research in biotechnology and life-sciences through the "DBT-Junior Research Fellowship" (DBT-JRF) Programme.

schemes.name: Improved Cultivation and Advanced Retting Exercise (I-CARE)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to support small and marginal jute growers with adequate pre and post harvesting operations to improve fiber quality and receive higher prices. The scheme provides 100% certified seeds at subsidized rates, free mechanical equipment, microbial consortiums, retting ponds.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: \Small Cardamom Replanting/New Planting: For Kerala & Tamilnadu
schemes.brief: Under this scheme to motivate growers to improve production and productivity through systematic replanting of diseased, old, and senile plantations, and to undertake area expansion.

schemes.name: Atal Bhujal Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Water Resources,River Development & Ganga Rejuvenation
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to improve the management of groundwater resources in water-stressed areas. It provides institutional strengthening and financial incentives to Gram Panchayats and local communities for sustainable groundwater management and water-efficient practices.

schemes.name: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
schemes.brief: The scheme “Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana (ABVKY)” was introduced by the Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) on a pilot basis for a period of 2 years w.e.f. 01.07.2018 for providing relief to the Insured Persons (IPs) who have become unemployed.

schemes.name: Post Doctoral Fellowship To Women Candidates
schemes.brief: The UGC has initiated a scheme of “Post Doctoral Fellowship for Women” to those candidates, who are unemployed holding Ph.D. degree in their respective subject areas with an aim to accelerate the talented instincts of the women candidates to carry out the advanced studies and research.

schemes.name: Student Internship Programme
schemes.ministry: Comptroller And Auditor General Of India
schemes.brief: The Student Internship Program, a unique learning opportunity aims to provide the Interns exposure to the functioning of the CAG of India and the Indian Audit & Accounts Department.

schemes.name: Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme provides financial assistance to youth of the target group to enhance their skills & employability.

schemes.name: Education Loan Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A scheme named Education Loan Scheme by National Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation (NSFDC) under the M/o Social Justice and Empowerment provides loans to students from Scheduled Castes who are pursuing full-time professional or technical courses in recognized institutions.

schemes.name: PM-YASASVI: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to the OBC, EBC and DNT students studying at post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education.

schemes.name: RKVY Soil Health and Fertility Village level Soil Testing Lab
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide easy and affordable access to soil testing facilities at the village level and support rural youth through financial assistance of ₹1,50,000/- for establishing Village Level Soil Testing Labs.

schemes.name: Garima Greh Shelter Homes For Transgender Persons
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The aims to provide shelter, protection, rehabilitation, livelihood opportunities, and social reintegration support to transgender persons. It also provides shelter facilities, food, medical care, counselling, legal assistance, skill development, and document support to transgender persons.

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to increase the Gross Enrolment Ratio of SC students in higher education by providing financial assistance to students from economically weaker families at the post-matriculation or post-secondary level, enabling them to continue and complete their education.

schemes.name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Education Of Children & Widows Of Ex-Servicemen
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month per child to a maximum of two dependent children of eligible Ex-Servicemen (ESM) or their widows for school and undergraduate education, and to widows pursuing a postgraduate degree.

schemes.name: Prime Minister Research Chair (PMRC) Scheme - For Fellows
schemes.brief: The scheme is a flagship national initiative that aims to attract & engage leading Indian-origin researchers, scientists & professionals from abroad & place them at premier government higher education institutions & national research laboratories in India to undertake cutting-edge research.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to stimulate employment creation, increase workforce formalization, and enhance employability. It provides financial incentives to first-time employees and offers wage subsidies to eligible employers for creating sustained jobs, especially in manufacturing.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
schemes.brief: A non-contributory pension scheme to provide social security to widows of poor family (BPL)  of the society.

schemes.name: Agricultural Extension
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: Extension Division endeavours towards successful implementation of Agricultural Extension activities. Through its various programmes, schemes and activities, Extension Division helps farmers to get information regarding scientific research and new knowledge in agricultural practices.

schemes.name: National Pension Scheme For Traders And Self Employed Persons
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide old age protection and social security to workers in the unorganized sector. It offers an assured monthly pension of ₹3,000/- after age sixty, with matching government contributions, to benefit small shopkeepers, retail traders, and self-employed persons.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom : Small Cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Irrigation / Water Storage Structure (nos)
schemes.brief: Under this scheme, to motivate the growers to bring more area under irrigation and land development by constructing water storage structures for increasing the productivity and improving quality of small cardamom.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Organic Farming: Organic Certification Groups
schemes.brief: Under this scheme to support farmer groups/FPOs in acquiring organic certification for the farm which is a prerequisite for marketing of organic spices.

schemes.name: Scheme of Human Resources Development in Sports: Assistance for Research
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for sports-related research projects that contribute to the improvement of sports and games in India and promote innovation in sports sciences, medicine, psychology, performance enhancement, and other sports-related disciplines.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Post-Harvest Improvement: Seed spice thresher (nos)
schemes.brief: To motivate the farmers to adopt hygienic threshing practices for production of quality seed spices using mechanical seed spices threshers (power operated)

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.brief: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is an insurance scheme offering life insurance cover for death due to any reason. It is a one-year cover, renewable from year to year. The scheme is offered by banks/post offices and administered through life insurance companies.

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
schemes.brief: An employment scheme by the MoRD, providing provide at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled work. Any Indian citizen above the age of 18 years and residing in a rural area can apply to this scheme.

schemes.name: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Tribes (ST) Students
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs for regular, full-time ST students to obtain higher education (post-graduate courses viz. Masters, Ph.D. and Post-Doctoral Research) from foreign institutes/universities. The Scheme is implemented through the Indian Embassies.

schemes.name: Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship For Scheduled Caste Candidates
schemes.brief: The Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship (RGNF) Scheme for Scheduled Caste is formulated and funded by the Ministry of Social Justice &Empowerment. The scheme is open to candidates who belong to Scheduled Caste and are pursuing higher studies such as regular and full-time M.Phil.and Ph.D.degrees.

schemes.name: Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) And Research Associateship (RA) For Foreign Nationals
schemes.brief: The scheme was initiated keeping in view the political and cultural bilateral relations of India with other developing countries: Asia, Africa, Latin America. The scheme has opened new vistas for foreign students and teachers, enable them to come to India and undertake advanced studies and research.

schemes.name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship For Minority Students
schemes.brief: Maulana Azad National Fellowship For Minority Students was launched in 2009 by the Ministry of Minority Affairs for providing financial aid to students for their higher studies.

schemes.name: CIFE - Institutional Fellowship
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: From the year 2010 onwards, the division is offering Masters and PhD in two disciplines namely Fish Nutrition and Feed Technology and Fish physiology and Biochemistry with an objective of moulding professionals with fundamental and advanced knowledge and expertise.

schemes.name: Land Ports Authority Of India (LPAI) Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The Land Ports Authority of India (LPAI) is pleased to announce its annual internship program for the academic year 2025-26. This program provides a unique opportunity for students and research scholars from BBIN countries (Bhutan, India, Nepal, and Bangladesh) to gain practical experience in LPAI

schemes.name: National Action Plan for Skill Development of Persons with Disabilities
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A dedicated skill development program aimed at providing high-quality vocational training with a focus on PwDs. The objective is to enhance the skills of PwDs by providing quality vocational skill training, enabling them to gain meaningful employment and become contributing members of society.

schemes.name: Welfare Measures for Children of Labourers
schemes.brief: This scheme aims to provide welfare measures in the form of educational stipends, incentives for academic excellence, and financial support for higher education to the children of SC/ST labourers who demonstrate exceptional academic performance and pursue higher education after 10th grade.

schemes.name: GST Exemption Certificate Scheme
schemes.brief: "GST Exemption Certificate Scheme" has been introduced by the Dept. of Heavy Industries, for issuing certificates to Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) having a disability percentage equal to or greater than 40%. The scheme provides GSC Concession to orthopedically disabled persons on purchase of car.

schemes.name: Pension Scheme for the Tappers in Small Rubber Plantations
schemes.brief: The scheme “Pension Scheme for the Tappers in Small Rubber Plantations” was launched by the Rubber Board, Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India to motivate tappers and retain them in the tapping job.

schemes.name: AICTE-INAE Distinguished Visiting Professorship Scheme
schemes.brief: All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE) distinguished visiting Professor scheme envisages promotion of industry-institute interaction.

schemes.name: AICTE-National Initiative for Training of Technical Teachers (for Inductee Teachers) Scheme
schemes.brief: Ministry of Human Resource Development (MHRD) and All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) jointly proposed an initiative called “National Initiative for Technical Teachers Training (NITTT)” to address the technical teachers of the country who plays an active role in the technical education

schemes.name: Kera Suraksha Insurance Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The ‘Kera Suraksha Insurance Scheme’ is a comprehensive Group Personal Accident Insurance Scheme, implemented by Coconut Development Board in association with Public Insurance companies for Coconut Tree Climbers/Neera Technicians/Coconut Harvesters.

schemes.name: National Savings Certificates (VIII-Issue) Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme “National Savings Certificates (VIII-Issue) Scheme” was launched by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance, Government of India to promote a culture of long-term savings among individuals.

schemes.name: Sub-mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.brief: The Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying introduced the National Livestock Mission as umbrella scheme. The "Sub-mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry" is the realigned National Livestock Mission, which is the scheme's sub-mission.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (PM-Vidyalaxmi) Scheme
schemes.brief: The "Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (Pm-vidyalaxmi) Scheme" aims to provide financial support for higher education through education loans. Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to meritorious students seeking admission to domestic institutions.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-yojana (PM-MKSSY): COMPONENT 1B: One-Time Incentive for the Adoption of Aquaculture Insurance
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.brief: The Component 1B of PM-MKSSY provides a one-time incentive to eligible applicants who have availed institutional credit for fisheries-related activities. The objective is to encourage formal credit adoption and support the repayment capacity of fisheries microenterprises.

schemes.name: DESW Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to engage Indian Youth as interns to gain firsthand experience and understanding of welfare, healthcare, resettlement, and administrative schemes meant for Ex-Servicemen.

schemes.name: Scheme For Residential Education For Students in High Schools in Targeted Areas (SHRESHTA): Mode 1 - SHRESHTA Schools (Best CBSE Private Residential Schools)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide access to high quality education to students from Scheduled Caste communities in best private residential schools. It provides scholarships and bridge courses to meritorious Scheduled Caste students selected through national entrance test.

schemes.name: Scheme For Residential Education For Students in High Schools in Targeted Areas (SHRESHTA): Mode 2 - NGO Operated Schools
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The sub-scheme aims to provide quality education and opportunities to students from SC communities through grant-in-aid institutions run by Non-Governmental Organizations and residential high schools, addressing the gap in service deficient Scheduled Caste dominant areas in the education sector.

schemes.name: Scheme for Action Research and Studies on Judicial Reforms
schemes.brief: The scheme provides financial assistance for undertaking action research, evaluation studies, monitoring studies, capacity building, publishing reports, and promoting innovative programmes in the areas of Justice Delivery, Legal Research, and Judicial Reforms.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana
schemes.brief: The scheme provides comprehensive support through six key components, including integrated village development under Pradhan Mantri Adi Adarsh Gram Yojana, development of Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups, support to Tribal Research Institutes, and Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarships.

schemes.name: Scholarships for Higher Education for Young Achievers Scheme (SHREYAS)  (OBC & Others)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to ensure the educational empowerment of OBC and EBC students. Through this scheme, fellowships and interest subsidies on overseas education loans are provided to eligible beneficiaries.

schemes.name: BSR Fellowship Scheme for Science Students - UGC
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to provide opportunities to meritorious candidates to undertake advanced studies and research leading to Ph.D. degrees in sciences.

schemes.name: National Service Scheme
schemes.brief: The objective of the National Service Scheme (NSS) is to develop the personality and character of students through voluntary community service. The scheme aims to promote social responsibility, leadership, national integration, and a spirit of selfless service among youth.

schemes.name: Samarth-Respite Care Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: Samarth (Respite Care) scheme, launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, aims at setting up Samarth Centres for providing respite and residential care for the specified categories of Persons with Disability (PwD).

schemes.name: Pre- Matric Scholarships Scheme for Scheduled Castes & Others
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for Scheduled Castes & others is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme implemented by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India.

schemes.name: Visiting Advanced Joint Research Faculty Scheme
schemes.brief: VAJRA Faculty Scheme is a dedicated program exclusively for overseas scientists and academicians with emphasis on NRI and Persons of Indian Origin/Overseas Citizen of India to work as adjunct/visiting faculty for a specific period of time in Indian Public funded academic and research institutions.

schemes.name: SERB International Research Experience
schemes.brief: The Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), a statutory body under the Department of Science and Technology, Government of India has launched "SERB International Research Experience (SIRE)".

schemes.name: SERB Research Scientist Scheme
schemes.brief: SERB Board has launched a new ‘SERB Research Scientist (SRS) Scheme’ for the awardees of INSPIRE Faculty and Ramanujan Fellowships, who fail to secure regular positions after completion of the regular tenure of five years in the respective schemes.

schemes.name: J.C. Bose Fellowship
schemes.brief: The “J.C. Bose fellowship” is awarded to active scientists in recognition of their outstanding performance. The fellowship is scientist-specific and very selective.

schemes.name: National Energy Conservation Award
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize and reward organizations for their exemplary efforts in energy conservation and energy efficiency.

schemes.name: National Dhanwantari Ayurveda Award
schemes.brief: The objective of the award is to motivate vaidyas and Ayurveda experts to adopt and showcase best practices in Ayurveda, promoting high standards of excellence. The award also aims to encourage innovation and outstanding performance in the field through healthy competition.

schemes.name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to ₹ 2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.

schemes.name: Rastriya Arogya Nidhi - Health Minister’s Cancer Patient Fund
schemes.brief: The scheme-component aims to provide financial assistance to poor patients living below the poverty line and suffering from cancer, for their treatment at 27 Regional Cancer Centers (RCCs).

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Package : Insurance Scheme For Health Workers Fighting COVID-19
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial protection through insurance cover of ₹50,00,000/- to healthcare workers fighting COVID-19.

schemes.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Consolidation of Coffee
schemes.brief: The scheme "Consolidation of Coffee" aims to increase the productivity of the existing coffee holdings by gap filling or rejuvenation, followed by improved cultivation methods such as application of compost, bush management, shade management, pest and disease control, etc.

schemes.name: Scholarship Scheme for Girl Children of Workers of Jute Mills/MSME JDP Units
schemes.brief: National Jute Board Act, 2008 provides to “secure better working conditions and provisions and improve amenities and incentives for workers engaged in the jute industry.”

schemes.name: Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana (Scholarship For Promotion Of Aptitude & Research In Stamps As A Hobby)
schemes.brief: "Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana" awards annual scholarships to students who have good academic records and are also pursuing 'Philately' as a hobby. The objective is to “Promote Philately among children at a young age in a sustainable manner that can reinforce and supplement the academic curriculum.

schemes.name: Varishtha Pension Bima Yojana
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide a pension scheme for senior citizens. Through this scheme, immediate annuity, pension, and return of purchase price on death are provided to citizens aged 60 years and above.
tags: Return Of Purchase Price On Death

schemes.name: WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship
schemes.brief: “WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship” is a new programme of the Department of Science & Technology that aims to provide opportunities to women scientists & technologists between the age group of 27-60 years who want to continue their research as bench-level scientists in basic and applied sciences.

schemes.name: LLB Internship Programme
schemes.brief: Department of Justice introduced an Internship Programme for young law students. The purpose is to well acquaint law students in the field of research & referencing work, in various specialized areas of justice delivery, such as Tele-Law, Nyaya Bandhu etc.

schemes.name: Good Samaritan Scheme
schemes.brief: Launched on 3rd Oct 2021 by the MoRTH, the scheme grants an award to the good samaritan who has saved the life of a victim of a fatal accident (involving a motor vehicle) by administering immediate assistance and rushing to the Hospital/Trauma Care Centre within the Golden Hour of the accident.

schemes.name: National Scheme Of Incentive To Girls For Secondary Education
schemes.brief: The National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education promotes the girl child's enrolment of 14-18 years age group at secondary stage, who passes class 8th and subsequently drops out for various socio-economic reasons.

schemes.name: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship For Single Girl Child
schemes.brief: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship for Single Girl Child (SJSGC) is a Fellowship Scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education, for pursuing research work leading to the award of a Ph.D. degree. The target group of this scheme is the ‘single girl child'.

schemes.name: Advanced Vocational Training Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide innovative, effective and integrated training opportunities for work force who need new skills to enjoy the dignity that comes with employment, independence and self-reliance.

schemes.name: PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.brief: PM SVANidhi is a micro-credit scheme launched on 1st June 2020 by the MoHUA to provide handholding support to street vendors. The scheme facilitates a working capital collateral-free loan of ₹10,000, with subsequent loans of ₹20,000 and ₹50,000 with a 7% interest subsidy.

schemes.name: Financial Assistance To Visually Challenged Teachers
schemes.brief: Financial assistance scheme providing up to ₹36,000 annually to visually challenged permanent college teachers for reader assistance, Braille books, and learning aids. Implemented by University Grants Commission to support teaching, research, and academic independence.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods (Air Conditioners and LED Lights)
schemes.brief: The scheme targets manufacturers of components / sub-assemblies of Air Conditioners & LED Lights and offers 4–6% incentive on incremental sales to boost localization, reduce imports, and build a domestic supply chain.

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarships to the Children of Those Engaged in Occupations Involving Cleaning and Prone to Health Hazards
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to children whose parents/guardians belong to one of the following categories, to pursue Pre-Matric education: Tanners, Flayers, Waste Pickers and Persons who are either presently engaged in Manual Scavenging.

schemes.name: Prime Minister’s Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide internship opportunities to one crore youth in top 500 companies in five years. Through this Scheme, youth will gain exposure for 12 months to real-life business environment, across varied professions and employment opportunities.

schemes.name: Scheme of Internship for Post-Graduate/Research Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Statistics and Programme Implementation
schemes.brief: MoSPI is implementing the scheme of Internship for Post-graduate/Research Students of Statistics/ Mathematical Statistics/ Operations Research/ Economics/ Demography or any of the applied field of Statistics of recognized Universities//Institutions.

schemes.name: National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemes.brief: The "National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme" by MNRE provides internship opportunities to facilitate students pursuing undergraduate/graduate/post-graduate degrees (Engineering, Science, Management, Law, etc) or research scholars enrolled in recognized institutes/universities.

schemes.name: Khadi Gramodyog Vikas Yojana: Gramodyog Vikas Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to increase productivity and wages of Khadi artisans, improve production infrastructure, boost employment and sales, revive traditional rural skills, modernize sales outlets, and promote marketing and exports.

schemes.name: Financial Support To The Students Of N.E.R For Higher Professional Courses (NEC Merit Scholarship)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Development Of North Eastern Region
schemes.brief: The scholarship scheme aims to support students of the North Eastern States undergoing studies in different disciplines at different levels in Institutions inside as well as outside the North-East but within the country.

schemes.name: Ramalingaswami Re-Entry Fellowship
schemes.brief: The Department of Biotechnology has instituted a scheme known as the “Ramalingaswami Re-Entry Fellowship”. The scheme is aimed at Indian Nationals who are working overseas in various fields of biotechnology and life sciences and are interested in taking up scientific research positions in India.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for Railway Protection Force
schemes.brief: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme (PMSS) for RPF was announced by Hon’ble Prime Minister of India in his address to the nation from the historical Red Ford on 15th August 2005 to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex/Serving RPF/RPSF personnel& widows.

schemes.name: Research Associates (RA)
schemes.brief: The Research Associates (RAs) of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) in India are individuals who engage in research work under the DBT-Research Associateship Program in Biotechnology and its was started in 1999.

schemes.name: IGSTC Industrial Fellowship- PhD Industrial Exposure Fellowship
schemes.brief: The "Indo-German Science & Technology Centre (IGSTC) Industrial Fellowship Programme" was launched by Secretary, Department of Science and Technology, Govt. of India on the occasion of IGSTC’s 11th Foundation Day on 14th June 2021 to support young Indian researchers for industrial exposure in German

schemes.name: Prime Minister’s Fellowship for Doctoral Research
schemes.brief: Prime Minister’s Fellowship for Doctoral Research scheme is a prestigious initiative of Science and Engineering Research Board (SERB), Department of Science & Technology, Government of India towards the advancement of university research engagements in line with industry requirement.

schemes.name: Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities Fellowship
schemes.brief: The “WISE-SCOPE Fellowship” Program was started by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India with the aims to provide opportunity to Women Scientists and Technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their S&T knowledge and expertise for the benefit of society.

schemes.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

schemes.name: IGSTC Industrial Fellowship- Post Doctoral Industrial Fellowship
schemes.brief: This programme is aimed at encouraging Postdoctoral researchers/fresh PhDs in S&T with appreciable track record and having aptitude for applied research and technology development.

schemes.name: Internship Scheme Of The Ministry Of Labour & Employment
schemes.brief: Through the Internship Scheme, the Ministry of Labour & Employment engage eligible students as “Interns" to work for mutual benefit. The “Interns” shall have an opportunity to know about the Government functioning and Department Policy issues in the Government of India.

schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme-2
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.brief: To promote apprenticeship training in the country, by providing partial stipend support to the apprentices engaged under the Apprentice Act, 1961, undertaking capacity building of the apprenticeship ecosystem, and providing advocacy assistance to the stakeholders.

schemes.name: Promotion of Exportable surplus of identified spices in NE: Cultivation of NE ginger (Ha)
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to promote the cultivation of ginger in the North Eastern region by supporting farmers with financial assistance for quality planting material, enhancing productivity and quality, and increasing the exportable surplus of spices from the region.

schemes.name: Quality Improvement Programme (QIP)
schemes.brief: The primary objective of this scheme is to enhance the expertise and capabilities of faculty members in degree and diploma-level institutions across the country. The aim is to enable teachers to acquire Master's and Doctoral degrees and instil in them a culture of research.

schemes.name: Post Doctoral Fellowship to Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Candidates
schemes.brief: This scheme has been initiated keeping in view social background of candidates from the deprived section of society and to provide them an opportunity to undertake advanced studies and research in Science, Engineering & Technology, Humanities and Social Sciences in Indian Universities/Institutions.

schemes.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.

schemes.name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance To 100% Disabled Child Of Ex-Servicemen
schemes.brief: A scheme to provide financial assistance to Ex-Servicemen or their widows for their 100% disabled child.

schemes.name: Jute Design Resource Centre Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to foster innovation and product diversification in the Jute Diversified Products sector. It provides innovative designs, skill training, and technical specifications to Jute Artisans, Micro Small and Medium Enterprises, Exporters, and Women Self Help Groups.

schemes.name: Education Loan Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.brief: Loan of upto ₹20,00,000/- for domestic courses & ₹30,00,000/- for courses abroad under Credit  Line-1 and Credit line -2 is extended to beneficiaries belong to minority communities at 3% p.a. & 8% p.a respectively.

schemes.name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Upgradation of Merit of Scheduled Caste Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to upgrade the merit of Scheduled Caste students by providing them with facilities for all round development through education in residential or non-residential schools, addressing their educational deficiencies that prevent them from taking advantage of reservation quotas.

schemes.name: Construction of Hostels for OBC Boys and Girls
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The Scheme aims at providing hostel facilities to students belonging to socially and educationally backward classes, especially from rural areas, to enable them to pursue secondary and higher education.

schemes.name: Post Doctoral Fellowship (PRL Funded)
schemes.brief: The fellowship offers candidates the opportunity to pursue research in PRL’s cutting-edge science & engineering research areas. The tenure of the fellowship is for a maximum of two years, subject to annual progress reviews. The fellowship provides a competitive stipend, research opportunities.

schemes.name: PM-YASASVI: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC, and DNT students (who are not covered under SC, ST, or OBC) is welfare and motivation to the children of these categories by providing financial assistance at pre-matriculation or secondary stage.

schemes.name: Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award
schemes.brief: The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award was established to commemorate the birth centenary of Pujya Shri Mota, the founder of the Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad. It is awarded to an eminent Indian scientist for their innovative and outstanding contributions to the field of Science and Technology.

schemes.name: Post Graduate Scholarship for University Rank Holders Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to attract talented students towards higher education and promote academic excellence at the postgraduate level. The scholarship is tenable for the full duration of the postgraduate course, subject to a maximum period of two years.

schemes.name: Netaji Subhas - ICAR International Fellowship
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to develop competent human resources in agriculture and allied sciences through international doctoral education and research opportunities, while providing fellowship support, travel assistance, and exposure to world-class institutions.

schemes.name: Prime Minister Research Chair (PMRC) Scheme - For Host Institutions
schemes.brief: The scheme is a flagship national initiative that aims to attract & engage leading Indian-origin researchers, scientists & professionals from abroad & place them at premier government higher education institutions & national research laboratories in India to undertake cutting-edge research.

schemes.name: National Talent Scholarship Postgraduate
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: Merit-based support through the National Talent Scholarship to the post-graduate students seeking admission in agricultural universities in a state other than the state of their domicile through ICAR All India Entrance Examination (AIEE).

schemes.name: Financial Assistance for Education to the Wards of Beedi/Cine/IOMC/LSDM Workers – Pre & Post-Matric
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to fund the pre-matric and post-matric education of wards belonging to specific mine, beedi, and cine workers. It provides annual scholarships between ₹1,000/- and ₹25,000/- based on the student's academic level and course type.

schemes.name: Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award
schemes.brief: Named after the hockey wizard Major Dhyan Chand (1905–79), an Indian legendary field hockey player, "Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award" is the highest sporting honour of India. Instituted in 1991–1992, the award is conferred annually by the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports, Government of India.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0 - Recognition Of Prior Learning
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to certify the existing skills of experienced candidates. Through this scheme, free assessment, upskilling, certification, and insurance are provided to Indian candidates.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Organic Farming: Internal Control System (ICS) (nos)
schemes.brief: Under this scheme to support the grower groups / FPOs to establish grower group certification in order to prepare farmers on group formation, organic regulations, certification procedures, training, documentation, internal inspection etc. for organic certification and aggregation of the produce.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom:  Small Cardamom Irrigation Land Development : Irrigation equipment (Nos.)
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to encourage small cardamom growers to bring more area under irrigation and land development in order to increase productivity and improve the quality of small cardamom.

schemes.name: National Career Service Centers For SC/STs (erstwhile Coaching-cum-Guidance Centre for SC/STs)
schemes.brief: The scheme provides vocational guidance, confidence-building programmes, personality development sessions, practice in typing and shorthand, special coaching for competitive exams, and computer training courses. The applicant must be an educated, unemployed SC/ST jobseeker.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0 - Short-Term Training
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide demand-driven, employability-focused skill training. Through this scheme, free NSQF-aligned training, On-the-Job Training, certification, and allowances are provided to Indian youth.

schemes.name: Student READY (Rural Entrepreneurship Awareness Development Yojana)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The Student READY (Rural Entrepreneurship Awareness Development Yojana) program aims to provide rural entrepreneurship awareness, and practical experience in a real-life situation in rural agriculture, and create awareness to undergraduate students about practical agriculture and allied sciences.

schemes.name: Khelo India Scheme: Creation and Upgradation of Sports Infrastructure
schemes.brief: The scheme component aims to create and upgrade sports infrastructure across the country by providing financial assistance for modern sports facilities, sports science infrastructure, and sports equipment to eligible entities.

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Post-Harvest Improvement: Turmeric boiler ( nos)
schemes.brief: To motivate the growers to boil the turmeric hygienically using steam boiling unit and to produce quality turmeric suitable for exports

schemes.name: Pravasi Bharatiya Bima Yojana
schemes.brief: A mandatory insurance scheme by Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) for safeguarding the interests of Indian emigrant workers falling under Emigration Check Required (ECR) category going for overseas employment to ECR countries.

schemes.name: SMILE - Comprehensive Rehabilitation For Welfare Of Transgender Persons – Skill Development And Training
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to the person belonging to transgender person community by providing them market-oriented skills.

schemes.name: SMILE - Comprehensive Rehabilitation For Welfare Of Transgender Persons
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: A scheme to provide Financial Assistance in the form of scholarships is provided to Transgender students studying in secondary school (IX & X)  & senior secondary school (XI & XII) to reduce the incidence of dropout and support their educational aspirations.

schemes.name: Pre Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribe Students
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Tribal Affairs for regular, full time students from Scheduled Tribe studying in Class 9th and 10th, in a Government School or in a School recognized by Govt. or a Central/State Board of Secondary Education.

schemes.name: Digital India Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: An opportunity for a student to secure practical work experience under the guidance of a qualified and experienced Supervisor/Mentor in Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) in the form of Digital India Internship Scheme.

schemes.name: Junior Research Fellowship In Sciences, Humanities, And Social Sciences
schemes.brief: The scheme of Junior Research Fellowship in Sciences, Humanities, and Social Science by UGC, Dept. of Education, is open to candidates who qualify for the National Eligibility Test-Junior Research Fellowship(NET-JRF) of the UGC and the UGC-Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (UGC-CSIR).

schemes.name: Dr. D.S. Kothari Post Doctoral Fellowships In Sciences
schemes.brief: Dr. D.S. Kothari Post Doctoral Fellowships in Sciences was introduced by the UGC. In addition to the existing RA/PDF positions provided by various funding agencies, a need was felt for a PDF scheme running in a flexible mode, with fast track, online handling, and decision-making.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojna (PMFBY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana was launched in  2016 with the aim to support farmers by providing an affordable comprehensive risk cover for crops.

schemes.name: Tenzing Norgay National Adventure Award
schemes.brief: MYAS confers the Tenzing Norgay National Adventure Award in order to recognize the achievements of persons associated with the field of adventure and to encourage young people to develop the spirit of endurance, risk-taking, cooperative teamwork, and quick, ready, and effective reflexes.

schemes.name: NIELIT Internship Programme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The Internship Programme by NIELIT is an opportunity for a student to secure first-hand and practical work experience under the guidance of qualified and experienced Supervisors/Mentors. It also aims at active participation in the learning process through experimentation.

schemes.name: Programme For Internship For LL.B./ LL.M./ Environmental Studies/ Research Students
schemes.brief: The National Green Tribunal provides opportunities to college students by holding Summer Internship Programs (March, April, May and July ordinarily) and Winter Internship Programs (November, December and January ordinarily) Internship Programs for LL.B./ LL.M./ Env. Studies/ Research Students.

schemes.name: Internship Scheme For PG/Research Students In Directorate General Of Trade Remedies (DGTR)
schemes.brief: The Internship Scheme by the Directorate General of Trade Remedies (DGTR) provides opportunities for young scholars, especially from Law / Economics stream, interested in learning about trade remedial investigations.

schemes.name: Internship Scheme Of Employees’ Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
schemes.brief: The Internship Scheme of Employees’ Provident Fund Organization invites applications for Internships from students for engagement as “Interns” with EPFO. The “Interns” shall have an opportunity to know about the EPFO’s functioning and Departmental Policy issues in EPFO and Government of India.

schemes.name: National Scheme of Apprenticeship Training
schemes.brief: The primary goal of this scheme is to bridge the gap in practical experience for fresh Graduate Engineers, Diploma holders, and 10+2 Vocational pass-outs in approximately 10,000 industrial establishments. The apprentices undergo a one-year training period, receiving a monthly stipend.

schemes.name: ASEAN-India Research Training Fellowship
schemes.brief: The “ASEAN-India Research Training Fellowship (AI-RTF)” is a fellowship scheme initiated by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India under ASEAN-India Science & Technology Development Fund to support young talented researchers/scientists of ASEAN member countries.

schemes.name: AICTE-QUALITY IMPROVEMENT (FOREIGN UNIVERSITY) PROGRAMME
schemes.brief: The All India Council for Technical Education in its 55th Meeting of the Council held on 14th August 2018 approved the Quality Improvement Programme (Foreign University) (QIP-FU). The QIP(FU) is an extension of the QIP program launched by the Government of India in the year 1970.

schemes.name: AICTE-Technical Book Writing & Translation Scheme
schemes.brief: AICTE-Technical Book Writing & Translation scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) to promote the use of 'Scheduled Regional Language' in Technical Education for creating knowledge base in local language.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: The Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar (PMRBP) is organized to celebrate the energy, determination, ability, zeal, and enthusiasm of our children.

schemes.name: Visitor's Award
schemes.brief: The Awards are given to recognize excellence in research and innovation of faculty members/researchers of the Central Universities

schemes.name: PM-YASASVI: Top Class College Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to recognize and promote quality education amongst Students belonging to OBC, EBC and DNT categories by providing full financial support. The Scheme will cover OBC/EBC/DNT students for pursuing studies beyond Class XII.

schemes.name: Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) Internship
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
schemes.brief: The SECI Internship Policy is designed to provide practical experience to students in the renewable energy sector. The program aims to give interns exposure to SECI's various divisions, helping them understand the renewable energy sector.

schemes.name: Micro Credit Finance (NSFDC)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from the SC community for units costing up to ₹1,40,000/- for income-generating activities.

schemes.name: Establishment of Regional Semen Production Laboratory and Semen Bank for sheep and goat
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.brief: Under the Establishment of Regional Semen Production Laboratory and Semen Bank for Sheep and Goat Scheme, the Central Government will provide assistance for the establishment of frozen semen production laboratories for goats and liquid semen production laboratories for sheep at the regional level.

schemes.name: Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant
schemes.brief: This programme is initiated by the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) to assist researchers to initiate their research career in a new institution with a flexible budget and progressive initiatives for ease of doing research.

schemes.name: Awarding Teleeducation Scholarships To Afghan Students
schemes.brief: The "Awarding Teleeducation Scholarships To Afghan Students" scheme under e-VidyaBharati Network Project, launched by the Ministry of External Affairs, offers 1000 annual scholarships to Afghan students for UGC-approved online UG and PG programs from Indian universities.

schemes.name: Information, Monitoring, Evaluation and Social Audit (I-MESA): Evaluation and Studies
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The "Evaluation and Studies" component of the scheme aims to establish institutionalized mechanisms for achieving transparency and accountability, generating lessons learned for real-time program improvement, and ensuring effective knowledge dissemination among stakeholders and targeted beneficiary.

schemes.name: Union Home Minister’s Medal for Excellence in Police Training
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize the crucial role of trainers and support staff in police organizations, making training a respectable assignment and promoting high quality in police training institutes. It provides recognition, a Certificate (Scroll), and a cash reward of ₹25,000/- to trainers.

schemes.name: “Ishan Uday” Special Scholarship Scheme For North Eastern Region
schemes.brief: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Education and the University Grants Commission. Taking special interest with regard to the promotion of higher education in the NER, i.e. for improving the GER, promoting higher education, and encouraging children belonging to the economically weaker sections.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme
schemes.brief: The scheme was introduced from the Academic year 2006-07 to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex-servicemen/ Ex-Coast Guard personnel and their widows.

schemes.name: Post Graduate Scholarship Scheme for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students-AICTE
schemes.brief: AICTE in order to ensure the development of technical education in India awards Post Graduate Scholarship of ₹12,400/- per month to full-time GATE/CEED qualified students admitted to AICTE approved post-graduate programs in AICTE approved Institutions/University Dept. as per AICTE approved intake.

schemes.name: Research Study/Seminar (Grant-in-Aid Scheme)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Statistics and Programme Implementation
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote Research Studies, Seminars, and Travel Grants Assistance in official statistics. It provides financial assistance and data support to eligible research institutions/organizations and Central Government officials to bridge data gaps.

schemes.name: Scheme for Economic Empowerment of De-notified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes - "Educational Empowerment" Component
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide good coaching quality for De-notified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes candidates to enable them to appear in competitive examinations. Provides free coaching and stipend support to students from these marginalized communities.

schemes.name: SERB - POWER Research Grants
schemes.brief: The aim of the ‘SERB - POWER Research Grants’ is to encourage emerging and eminent women researchers for individual-centric and competitive mode of research funding to undertake R&D activities in frontier areas of science and engineering.

schemes.name: Gharaunda-Group Home for Adults Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: Gharaunda (Group Home for Adults) scheme aims at setting up Gharaunda Centres or Registered Organisations (RO) for for all Adult PwDs covered under the National Trust Act with adequate and quality care service with acceptable living standards including provision of basic medical care from profession

schemes.name: SERB - POWER Fellowship
schemes.brief: The SERB - POWER Fellowship is designed to identify and reward excellent women researchers in Indian academic institutions and R&D laboratories, holding Ph.D. degrees in any branch of science and engineering.

schemes.name: Scheme for Financial Assistance to select States/UTs for Skill Development in Electronics System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) sector
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to enhance skill development capacity in the ESDM sector. Through this scheme, financial assistance and industry-relevant training are provided to students and unemployed youth.

schemes.name: Northeast BPO Promotion Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to promote the establishment of BPO and Information Technology Enabled Services units in the North-Eastern region. Through the scheme, financial assistance in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

schemes.name: Scheme for ‘Skill Development in ESDM for Digital India’
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to skill 3,28,000 candidates in the ESDM sector. Through this scheme, training and certification benefits are provided to students and unemployed youth.

schemes.name: Merit·cum·Means Scholarships For Under Graduate Studies In Various Branches Of Agriculture And Animal Science Subjects
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.brief: The scheme of "Merit·cum·Means Scholarships For Under Graduate Studies In Various Branches Of Agriculture And Animal Science Subjects" was introduced by ICAR with a view to attracting meritorious undergraduate students to prosecute their studies up to graduation level.

schemes.name: Scheme of Internship of Students to DRDO Labs/Estts for Project Training
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide an opportunity and exposure to future graduates and postgraduates in Engineering and General Sciences to the research and development activities carried out by DRDO in state-of-the-art technology in fields relevant to the defense sector.

schemes.name: GEN-NEXT Support for Innovative Startups (GENESIS)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to discover, support, grow, and accelerate successful startups in Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities, with a focus on inclusivity, accessibility, and affordability.

schemes.name: National Geoscience Awards
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to honour individuals and teams for extraordinary achievements and outstanding contributions in the field of mineral discovery & exploration, fundamental / applied geosciences, mining and allied areas.

schemes.name: National Award for Individual Excellence
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of this scheme is to recognize and encourage individuals working for the empowerment of persons with disabilities, including those covered under the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016.

schemes.name: Kendriya Grihmantri Dakshata Padak
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize excellent work, promote high professional standards, and boost morale of personnel serving in police forces, security organizations, intelligence units, and forensic science institutions across India.

schemes.name: National AIDS Control Organisation (NACO) Internship Programme
schemes.brief: NACO initiated the Internship Programme for young students who wish to engage with the Government. The internship programme envisages an opportunity for young students to get familiar with and understand the various dimensions of policy-making & implementation of the National AIDS Control Programme.

schemes.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Quality Upgradation / Certification: Supply of Baby Pulpers
schemes.brief: The scheme "Supply of Baby Pulpers" aims to facilitate the improvement of the quality of coffee produced by growers by encouraging them to establish infrastructure for quality enhancement and obtain certification for their coffees, enabling them to earn better returns.

schemes.name: Internship Programme Of The Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (MoEFCC)
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Environment,forests and climate change
schemes.brief: Internship at Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB) provides an excellent opportunity for students/researchers to familiarize themselves with various issues related to wildlife & the functioning of WCCB. The intern shall have an orientation session and will be assigned specific areas of work.

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to reduce maternal and neonatal mortality by promoting institutional deliveries among poor pregnant women. It offers cash assistance for institutional and home deliveries, along with antenatal and postnatal care support, primarily benefiting poor pregnant women across India.

schemes.name: Indo-French Postdoctoral Research Programme for Women in Science
schemes.brief: This programme will provide a platform for women candidates to engage & work with Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

schemes.name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
schemes.brief: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.

schemes.name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide a secure savings option with assured returns for women. Through this scheme, 7.5% interest and flexible savings benefits are provided to women and minor girls.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.brief: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (MOPNG), introduced the ‘"Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana 2.0" in India. The Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana (PMUY) is a scheme launched by the Government of India in 2016 to provide free LPG (liquefied petroleum gas) connections to women from below-poverty-line.

schemes.name: Internship Programme for Women Students / Scholars / Social Activists / Teachers
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: The Ministry of Women and Child Development launched the Internship Programme aims to harness the talent of the trainees, giving them an opportunity to work towards bringing more efficiency in the implementation of the schemes.

schemes.name: VAANI (Vibrant Advocacy for Advancement and Nurturing of Indian Languages)
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to create a knowledge base by conducting conferences, seminars, and workshops in twenty-two Indian languages. The scheme provides a maximum funding of ₹2,00,000/- per programme to eligible institutions, along with an honorarium of up to ₹5,000/- per session for subject experts.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.brief: The scheme is to provide maternity benefits to women belonging to socially and economically disadvantaged sections of society. For first child the maternity benefit of ₹5,000 is provided in two instalments under PMMVY and second child, it is ₹6,000 is to be provided subject to second child is girl.

schemes.name: National Centre For Communication Security (NCCS) Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: The National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Internship Scheme allows young talent to be associated with the NCCS work for mutual benefit. It will enable NCCS to interact with young scholars and to get fresh ideas and study/ research support from the field of academics.

schemes.name: ICMR-Junior Research Fellowship
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and research opportunities to eligible candidates through Junior Research Fellowship for pursuing Ph.D. programmes in medical and social science fields.

schemes.name: DPIIT Internship Scheme
schemes.brief: DPIIT has introduced an internship scheme for students pursuing Under Graduate/Post Graduate degrees or Research Scholars enrolled in recognized universities/Institutions within India or abroad. The applicants can choose the  period of their choice ranging from one/two/three months.

schemes.name: Scheme For Award Of Senior/Junior Fellowships To Outstanding Persons In The Fields Of Culture
schemes.brief: The scheme “Scheme for Award of Senior/Junior Fellowships to Outstanding Persons in the Fields of Culture” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India.

schemes.name: Divyangjan Kaushal Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to ensure dignified livelihood opportunities for Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) by providing industry-relevant and customized training specific to each group. The scheme provides skill development in high-growth sectors such as Information Technology, Animation, Visual Effect, etc.

schemes.name: Short Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to provide short-term advanced training and financial support to medical and health research personnel to enhance their skills and promote research in priority health areas.

schemes.name: Sagar Samman Award- Recognition of Outstanding Maritime Training Institutes
schemes.brief: The scheme aims to recognize excellence in maritime education and training by providing rankings and recognition to top maritime institutes.

schemes.name: Uttar Poorva Transformative Industrialization Scheme
schemes.brief: The UNNATI (Uttar Poorva Transformative Industrialization Scheme), 2024, is a Government of India initiative for Northeastern region of India offering various incentives to the industries in both sectors Manufacturing and Service.

schemes.name: Dr. Ambedakar Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarships for the Economically Backward Class (EBC) Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to the Economically Backward Class (EBC) students studying at the post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education. These scholarships shall be available for studies in India only.

schemes.name: Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.brief: The "Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs" scheme aims to involve the voluntary sector in improving the educational and socio-economic conditions of the target group i.e. OBCs to upgrade skills to enable them to start income-generating activities on their own.

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.brief: The scheme "PM Vishwakarma " by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, is a new scheme that envisages providing end-to-end holistic support to traditional artisans and craftspeople in scaling up their conventional products and services.

schemes.name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Diploma)
